```json
{
  "contents": "# Cursor Chat History\r\n\r\nA VS Code extension that automatically saves your Cursor AI chat history to Markdown files.\r\n\r\n## Features\r\n\r\n- ✅ **Automatic Monitoring**: Watches Cursor's database for changes\r\n- ✅ **Complete History**: Captures user messages, AI responses, and thinking processes\r\n- ✅ **Markdown Format**: Saves conversations in readable, version-control-friendly Markdown\r\n- ✅ **Timestamped Files**: Organizes files by date and conversation title\r\n- ✅ **Git Friendly**: Perfect for tracking AI conversations over time\r\n\r\n## Installation\r\n\r\n### From Source\r\n\r\n1. Clone this repository\r\n2. Run `npm install` to install dependencies\r\n   - The postinstall script will automatically download the correct binaries for your system\r\n   - If you encounter issues, run `npm run setup` manually\r\n3. Run `npm run compile` to build the extension\r\n4. Press F5 in VS Code to launch the extension in development mode\r\n\r\n> **Note**: This extension uses `better-sqlite3`, a native module. The installation script automatically handles downloading the correct prebuilt binaries for Electron. See [INSTALL_NOTES.md](INSTALL_NOTES.md) for troubleshooting.\r\n\r\n### From VSIX\r\n\r\n1. Download the `.vsix` file from releases\r\n2. In VS Code, go to Extensions view\r\n3. Click the `...` menu and select \"Install from VSIX...\"\r\n4. Select the downloaded file\r\n\r\n## Usage\r\n\r\nThe extension activates automatically when you open a workspace in Cursor.\r\n\r\n### Automatic Saving\r\n\r\nBy default, the extension automatically monitors your Cursor chat history and saves it to `.llm-chat-history/history/` in your workspace root.\r\n\r\n### Manual Save\r\n\r\nYou can manually trigger a save by:\r\n1. Opening the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+P)\r\n2. Running the command: \"LLMChatHisotry: Save Chat History Now\"\r\n\r\n## Configuration\r\n\r\nConfigure the extension in your VS Code settings:\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".llm-chat-history/history\",\r\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### Settings\r\n\r\n- `chatHistory.autoSave` (default: `true`): Enable automatic saving of chat history\r\n- `chatHistory.outputDirectory` (default: `.llm-chat-history/history`): Directory to save history files\r\n- `chatHistory.useUTC` (default: `true`): Use UTC timezone for timestamps\r\n\r\n## Output Format\r\n\r\nConversations are saved as Markdown files with the following format:\r\n\r\n```markdown\r\n<!-- Generated by Chat History Extension -->\r\n<!-- Cursor Session {id} ({timestamp}) -->\r\n\r\n# Conversation Title (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\r\n\r\n_**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\r\n\r\nUser's question here\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n_**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\r\n\r\n<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>\r\nAI's thinking process (if available)\r\n</details></think>\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\nAI's response here\r\n\r\n---\r\n```\r\n\r\n### File Naming\r\n\r\nFiles are named with the pattern: `YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MMZ-{title}.md`\r\n\r\nExample: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-implementing-chat-history.md`\r\n\r\n## Requirements\r\n\r\n- VS Code / Cursor 1.93.0 or higher\r\n- Active Cursor installation with chat history\r\n\r\n## Database Location\r\n\r\nThe extension reads from Cursor's SQLite database:\r\n\r\n- **Windows**: `%APPDATA%\\Roaming\\Cursor\\User\\globalStorage\\state.vscdb`\r\n- **macOS**: `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\r\n- **Linux**: `~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\r\n\r\n## Known Issues\r\n\r\n- The extension requires a workspace to be open\r\n- Database must be accessible (not locked by another process)\r\n- **Windows**: First-time installation may require Visual Studio Build Tools if prebuilt binaries are unavailable. See [QUICK_START.md](QUICK_START.md#故障排除) for solutions.\r\n\r\n## Contributing\r\n\r\nContributions are welcome! Please feel free to submit a Pull Request.\r\n\r\n## License\r\n\r\nMIT License - see LICENSE file for details\r\n\r\n## Support\r\n\r\nIf you encounter any issues, please file them in the GitHub repository.\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n**Note**: This extension is not officially affiliated with Cursor or Anysphere.\r\n\r\n\r\n",
  "numCharactersInRequestedRange": 4005,
  "totalLinesInFile": 136
}
```

```json
  "contentsAfterEdit": "# Cursor Chat History\r\n\r\nA proprietary VS Code extension that automatically saves your Cursor AI chat history to Markdown files. Distribution is limited to authorized users; do not share the source or binaries externally.\r\n\r\n## Features\r\n\r\n- ✅ **Automatic Monitoring**: Watches Cursor's database for changes\r\n- ✅ **Complete History**: Captures user messages, AI responses, and thinking processes\r\n- ✅ **Markdown Format**: Saves conversations in readable, version-control-friendly Markdown\r\n- ✅ **Timestamped Files**: Organizes files by date and conversation title\r\n- ✅ **Git Friendly**: Perfect for tracking AI conversations over time\r\n\r\n## Installation\r\n\r\n### From Source (authorized users)\r\n\r\n1. Obtain access to the private repository through your authorized channel\r\n2. Run `npm install` to install dependencies\r\n   - The postinstall script will automatically download the correct binaries for your system\r\n   - If you encounter issues, run `npm run setup` manually\r\n3. Run `npm run compile` to build the extension\r\n4. Press F5 in VS Code to launch the extension in development mode\r\n\r\n> **Note**: This extension uses `better-sqlite3`, a native module. The installation script automatically handles downloading the correct prebuilt binaries for Electron. See [INSTALL_NOTES.md](INSTALL_NOTES.md) for troubleshooting.\r\n\r\n### From VSIX\r\n\r\n1. Download the `.vsix` file from releases\r\n2. In VS Code, go to Extensions view\r\n3. Click the `...` menu and select \"Install from VSIX...\"\r\n4. Select the downloaded file\r\n\r\n## Usage\r\n\r\nThe extension activates automatically when you open a workspace in Cursor.\r\n\r\n### Automatic Saving\r\n\r\nBy default, the extension automatically monitors your Cursor chat history and saves it to `.llm-chat-history/history/` in your workspace root.\r\n\r\n### Manual Save\r\n\r\nYou can manually trigger a save by:\r\n1. Opening the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+P)\r\n2. Running the command: \"LLMChatHisotry: Save Chat History Now\"\r\n\r\n## Configuration\r\n\r\nConfigure the extension in your VS Code settings:\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".llm-chat-history/history\",\r\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### Settings\r\n\r\n- `chatHistory.autoSave` (default: `true`): Enable automatic saving of chat history\r\n- `chatHistory.outputDirectory` (default: `.llm-chat-history/history`): Directory to save history files\r\n- `chatHistory.useUTC` (default: `true`): Use UTC timezone for timestamps\r\n\r\n## Output Format\r\n\r\nConversations are saved as Markdown files with the following format:\r\n\r\n```markdown\r\n<!-- Generated by Chat History Extension -->\r\n<!-- Cursor Session {id} ({timestamp}) -->\r\n\r\n# Conversation Title (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\r\n\r\n_**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\r\n\r\nUser's question here\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n_**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\r\n\r\n<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>\r\nAI's thinking process (if available)\r\n</details></think>\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\nAI's response here\r\n\r\n---\r\n```\r\n\r\n### File Naming\r\n\r\nFiles are named with the pattern: `YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MMZ-{title}.md`\r\n\r\nExample: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-implementing-chat-history.md`\r\n\r\n## Requirements\r\n\r\n- VS Code / Cursor 1.93.0 or higher\r\n- Active Cursor installation with chat history\r\n\r\n## Database Location\r\n\r\nThe extension reads from Cursor's SQLite database:\r\n\r\n- **Windows**: `%APPDATA%\\Roaming\\Cursor\\User\\globalStorage\\state.vscdb`\r\n- **macOS**: `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\r\n- **Linux**: `~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\r\n\r\n## Known Issues\r\n\r\n- The extension requires a workspace to be open\r\n- Database must be accessible (not locked by another process)\r\n- **Windows**: First-time installation may require Visual Studio Build Tools if prebuilt binaries are unavailable. See [QUICK_START.md](QUICK_START.md#故障排除) for solutions.\r\n\r\n## Usage Rights\r\n\r\nThis is commercial, proprietary software. All rights are reserved, and redistribution or publication without prior written permission is prohibited.\r\n\r\n## Support\r\n\r\nFor support, contact the internal product team through the approved channel.\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n**Note**: This extension is not officially affiliated with Cursor or Anysphere.\r\n\r\n\r\n"
}
```

```1:23:README.md
# Cursor Chat History

A proprietary VS Code extension that automatically saves your Cursor AI chat history to Markdown files. Distribution is limited to authorized users; do not share the source or binaries externally.

## Installation

### From Source (authorized users)

1. Obtain access to the private repository through your authorized channel
2. Run `npm install` to install dependencies
   - The postinstall script will automatically download the correct binaries for your system
   - If you encounter issues, run `npm run setup` manually
3. Run `npm run compile` to build the extension
4. Press F5 in VS Code to launch the extension in development mode
```

```json
{
  "contents": "/**\r\n * 扩展主入口文件\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\r\nimport * as path from 'path';\r\nimport * as fs from 'fs';\r\nimport { DatabaseWatcher } from './database-watcher';\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 扩展激活时调用\r\n */\r\nexport function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {\r\n    console.log('Cursor Chat History Extension activated');\r\n    \r\n    // 获取配置\r\n    const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\r\n    const autoSave = config.get<boolean>('autoSave', true);\r\n    \r\n    if (!autoSave) {\r\n        console.log('Auto-save disabled');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 获取数据库路径\r\n    const dbPath = getCursorDatabasePath();\r\n    \r\n    // 检查数据库是否存在\r\n    if (!fs.existsSync(dbPath)) {\r\n        console.warn('Cursor database not found:', dbPath);\r\n        vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\r\n            'Cursor database not found. Make sure you are using Cursor IDE.'\r\n        );\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 检查是否有打开的工作区\r\n    if (!vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders || vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders.length === 0) {\r\n        console.warn('No workspace folder open');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 工作区路径（使用第一个工作区）\r\n    const workspaceRoot = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath;\r\n    if (!workspaceRoot) {\r\n        console.warn('No workspace folder path resolved');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // 启动监听\r\n    const watcher = new DatabaseWatcher(dbPath, workspaceRoot);\r\n    watcher.start();\r\n    \r\n    // 注册命令：手动保存\r\n    const saveCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\r\n        'chatHistory.saveNow',\r\n        () => {\r\n            watcher.syncNow();\r\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage('Chat history saved');\r\n        }\r\n    );\r\n    \r\n    context.subscriptions.push(saveCommand, {\r\n        dispose: () => watcher.stop()\r\n    });\r\n    \r\n    console.log('Cursor Chat History Extension ready');\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 扩展停用时调用\r\n */\r\nexport function deactivate() {\r\n    console.log('Cursor Chat History Extension deactivated');\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 获取 Cursor 数据库路径\r\n */\r\nfunction getCursorDatabasePath(): string {\r\n    const platform = process.platform;\r\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\r\n    \r\n    if (platform === 'win32') {\r\n        return path.join(\r\n            homeDir,\r\n            'AppData/Roaming/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\r\n        );\r\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\r\n        return path.join(\r\n            homeDir,\r\n            'Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\r\n        );\r\n    } else {\r\n        // Linux\r\n        return path.join(\r\n            homeDir,\r\n            '.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\r\n        );\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n",
  "numCharactersInRequestedRange": 2681,

}
```

```json
  "contents": "/**\r\n * Markdown 生成器\r\n * 将消息数组转换为格式化的 Markdown 文档\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport { ComposerData, Message } from './types';\r\n\r\nexport class MarkdownGenerator {\r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成 Markdown 文档\r\n     */\r\n    generate(\r\n        composer: ComposerData,\r\n        messages: Message[]\r\n    ): string {\r\n        let markdown = '';\r\n        \r\n        // 文件头\r\n        markdown += this.generateHeader(composer);\r\n        markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n        \r\n        // 标题\r\n        markdown += `# ${composer.name || 'Untitled'} (${this.formatDate(composer.createdAt)})\\n\\n`;\r\n        \r\n        // 消息\r\n        let previousSpeaker: string | null = null;\r\n        \r\n        for (const message of messages) {\r\n            // 如果发言者改变，添加发言者标记\r\n            if (message.type !== previousSpeaker) {\r\n                markdown += this.generateSpeakerHeader(message);\r\n                markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 思考过程（如果有）\r\n            if (message.thinking) {\r\n                markdown += this.generateThinking(message.thinking);\r\n                markdown += '\\n\\n---\\n\\n';\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 消息内容\r\n            markdown += message.text;\r\n            markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n            \r\n            // 工具调用（如果有）\r\n            if (message.toolUses && message.toolUses.length > 0) {\r\n                for (const toolUse of message.toolUses) {\r\n                    markdown += toolUse.markdown;\r\n                    markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            // 工具调用结果（如果有）\r\n            if (message.toolResults && message.toolResults.length > 0) {\r\n                markdown += this.generateToolResults(message.toolResults);\r\n                markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            markdown += '---\\n\\n';\r\n            \r\n            previousSpeaker = message.type;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return markdown;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成文件头\r\n     */\r\n    private generateHeader(composer: ComposerData): string {\r\n        return `<!-- Generated by Chat History Extension -->\r\n<!-- Cursor Session ${composer.composerId} (${this.formatDate(composer.createdAt)}) -->`;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成发言者标记\r\n     */\r\n    private generateSpeakerHeader(message: Message): string {\r\n        if (message.type === 'user') {\r\n            return `_**User (${this.formatDate(message.timestamp)})**_`;\r\n        } else {\r\n            const parts = [];\r\n            if (message.modelName) {\r\n                parts.push(`model ${message.modelName}`);\r\n            }\r\n            if (message.mode) {\r\n                parts.push(`mode ${message.mode}`);\r\n            }\r\n            const info = parts.length > 0 ? ` (${parts.join(', ')})` : '';\r\n            return `_**Agent${info}**_`;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成思考过程\r\n     */\r\n    private generateThinking(thinking: string): string {\r\n        return `<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>\r\n\r\n${thinking}\r\n\r\n</details></think>`;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成工具调用结果\r\n     */\r\n    private generateToolResults(toolResults: Array<{ name: string; result: any }>): string {\r\n        let markdown = '';\r\n        \r\n        for (const tool of toolResults) {\r\n            markdown += `<tool-use>\\n<details><summary>Tool: ${tool.name}</summary>\\n\\n`;\r\n            markdown += '```json\\n';\r\n            markdown += JSON.stringify(tool.result, null, 2);\r\n            markdown += '\\n```\\n';\r\n            markdown += `</details>\\n</tool-use>\\n`;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return markdown;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 格式化日期为 UTC\r\n     */\r\n    private formatDate(isoDate: string): string {\r\n        const date = new Date(isoDate);\r\n        const year = date.getUTCFullYear();\r\n        const month = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const day = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const hour = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const minute = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        \r\n        return `${year}-${month}-${day} ${hour}:${minute}Z`;\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n",

}
```

```json
{
  "contents": "/**\r\n * 对话数据重组器\r\n * 将 Composer 和 Bubble 数据转换为统一的消息格式\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport { ComposerData, Bubble, Message, AIResponseBubble, ToolUseBlock } from './types';\r\nimport { formatToolUse } from './tool-use-formatter';\r\n\r\nexport class ConversationBuilder {\r\n    /**\r\n     * 从 Composer 构建完整对话\r\n     */\r\n    buildConversation(\r\n        composer: ComposerData,\r\n        bubbles: Bubble[]\r\n    ): Message[] {\r\n        const messages: Message[] = [];\r\n        const bubbleMap = new Map<string, Bubble>();\r\n        \r\n        // 创建 bubble 映射\r\n        for (const bubble of bubbles) {\r\n            bubbleMap.set(bubble.bubbleId, bubble);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 按顺序处理\r\n        const headers = composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [];\r\n        \r\n        for (const header of headers) {\r\n            const bubble = bubbleMap.get(header.bubbleId);\r\n            if (!bubble) continue;\r\n            \r\n            if (header.type === 1 && bubble.type === 1) {\r\n                // 用户消息\r\n                messages.push({\r\n                    id: bubble.bubbleId,\r\n                    type: 'user',\r\n                    text: bubble.text || '',\r\n                    timestamp: bubble.createdAt,\r\n                    modelName: bubble.modelInfo?.modelName,\r\n                    mode: this.getMode(bubble.unifiedMode)\r\n                });\r\n            } else if (header.type === 2 && bubble.type === 2) {\r\n                // AI 响应\r\n                const toolUse = this.extractToolUse(bubble);\r\n                const toolUses: ToolUseBlock[] | undefined = toolUse ? [toolUse] : undefined;\r\n\r\n                messages.push({\r\n                    id: bubble.bubbleId,\r\n                    type: 'assistant',\r\n                    text: bubble.text || '',\r\n                    thinking: bubble.thinking?.text,\r\n                    timestamp: bubble.createdAt,\r\n                    modelName: bubble.modelInfo?.modelName,\r\n                    mode: this.getMode(bubble.unifiedMode),\r\n                    toolResults: bubble.toolResults,\r\n                    toolUses\r\n                });\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return messages;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取模式名称\r\n     */\r\n    private getMode(unifiedMode?: number): string {\r\n        switch (unifiedMode) {\r\n            case 1: return 'Chat';\r\n            case 2: return 'Agent';\r\n            default: return '';\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 提取工具调用 Markdown\r\n     */\r\n    private extractToolUse(bubble: AIResponseBubble): ToolUseBlock | null {\r\n        // Cursor 工具调用 capabilityType 为 15\r\n        if (bubble.capabilityType !== 15) {\r\n            return null;\r\n        }\r\n        return formatToolUse(bubble.toolFormerData);\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n",

}
```

```json
{
  "contents": "/**\r\n * 历史记录保存器\r\n * 负责将 Markdown 内容保存到文件系统\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport * as fs from 'fs/promises';\r\nimport * as path from 'path';\r\nimport { ComposerData } from './types';\r\n\r\nexport class HistorySaver {\r\n    private historyDir: string;\r\n    \r\n    constructor(workspaceRoot: string, outputDir: string = '.llm-chat-history/history') {\r\n        this.historyDir = path.join(workspaceRoot, outputDir);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 保存对话到文件\r\n     */\r\n    async save(composer: ComposerData, markdown: string): Promise<string> {\r\n        // 确保目录存在\r\n        await fs.mkdir(this.historyDir, { recursive: true });\r\n        \r\n        // 生成文件名\r\n        const filename = this.generateFilename(composer);\r\n        const filepath = path.join(this.historyDir, filename);\r\n        \r\n        // 检查是否需要更新\r\n        const shouldSave = await this.shouldSave(filepath, markdown);\r\n        \r\n        if (shouldSave) {\r\n            await fs.writeFile(filepath, markdown, 'utf-8');\r\n            console.log(`Saved: ${filename}`);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return filepath;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成文件名\r\n     */\r\n    private generateFilename(composer: ComposerData): string {\r\n        const date = new Date(composer.createdAt);\r\n        const year = date.getUTCFullYear();\r\n        const month = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const day = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const hour = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const minute = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        \r\n        const timestamp = `${year}-${month}-${day}_${hour}-${minute}Z`;\r\n        const title = this.sanitizeTitle(composer.name || 'untitled');\r\n        \r\n        return `${timestamp}-${title}.md`;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 清理标题中的特殊字符\r\n     */\r\n    private sanitizeTitle(title: string): string {\r\n        // 移除特殊字符\r\n        return title\r\n            .replace(/[<>:\"/\\\\|?*]/g, '-')\r\n            .replace(/\\s+/g, '-')\r\n            .toLowerCase()\r\n            .substring(0, 50);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 检查是否需要保存\r\n     */\r\n    private async shouldSave(filepath: string, newContent: string): Promise<boolean> {\r\n        try {\r\n            const existingContent = await fs.readFile(filepath, 'utf-8');\r\n            return existingContent !== newContent;\r\n        } catch {\r\n            // 文件不存在，需要保存\r\n            return true;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n",
```

```json
{
  "contents": "/**\r\n * 数据库读取器\r\n * 负责从 Cursor SQLite 数据库读取对话数据\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport Database from 'better-sqlite3';\r\nimport { ComposerData, Bubble, DatabaseRow } from './types';\r\n\r\nexport class CursorDatabaseReader {\r\n    private db: Database.Database;\r\n    \r\n    constructor(dbPath: string) {\r\n        // 只读模式 + WAL 模式\r\n        this.db = new Database(dbPath, {\r\n            readonly: true,\r\n            fileMustExist: true\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        // 设置 WAL 模式\r\n        this.db.pragma('journal_mode = WAL');\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取所有 Composer\r\n     */\r\n    getAllComposers(): ComposerData[] {\r\n        const stmt = this.db.prepare(`\r\n            SELECT key, value \r\n            FROM cursorDiskKV \r\n            WHERE key LIKE 'composerData:%'\r\n        `);\r\n        \r\n        const rows = stmt.all() as DatabaseRow[];\r\n        const composers: ComposerData[] = [];\r\n        \r\n        for (const row of rows) {\r\n            try {\r\n                // 值可能是 Buffer 或字符串\r\n                const valueStr = typeof row.value === 'string' \r\n                    ? row.value \r\n                    : row.value.toString('utf-8');\r\n                const data = JSON.parse(valueStr) as ComposerData;\r\n                composers.push(data);\r\n            } catch (error) {\r\n                console.error('Failed to parse composer:', error);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return composers;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取指定 Composer 的所有 Bubble\r\n     */\r\n    getComposerBubbles(composerId: string, bubbleIds: string[]): Bubble[] {\r\n        const bubbles: Bubble[] = [];\r\n        \r\n        for (const bubbleId of bubbleIds) {\r\n            const key = `bubbleId:${composerId}:${bubbleId}`;\r\n            const stmt = this.db.prepare('SELECT value FROM cursorDiskKV WHERE key = ?');\r\n            const row = stmt.get(key) as DatabaseRow | undefined;\r\n            \r\n            if (row && row.value) {\r\n                try {\r\n                    // 值可能是 Buffer 或字符串\r\n                    const valueStr = typeof row.value === 'string' \r\n                        ? row.value \r\n                        : row.value.toString('utf-8');\r\n                    const bubble = JSON.parse(valueStr) as Bubble;\r\n                    bubbles.push(bubble);\r\n                } catch (error) {\r\n                    console.error(`Failed to parse bubble ${bubbleId}:`, error);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return bubbles;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 关闭数据库连接\r\n     */\r\n    close(): void {\r\n        this.db.close();\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 带重试的数据库打开函数\r\n */\r\nexport async function openDatabase(dbPath: string, maxRetries = 3): Promise<CursorDatabaseReader> {\r\n    for (let i = 0; i < maxRetries; i++) {\r\n        try {\r\n            return new CursorDatabaseReader(dbPath);\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            if (i < maxRetries - 1) {\r\n                // 等待 500ms 后重试\r\n                await sleep(500);\r\n                continue;\r\n            }\r\n            throw error;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    throw new Error('Failed to open database after retries');\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction sleep(ms: number): Promise<void> {\r\n    return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, ms));\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n",
  "numCharactersInRequestedRange": 3169,
  "totalLinesInFile": 112
}
```

```json
{
  "contents": "/**\r\n * 数据库监听器\r\n * 监听 Cursor 数据库变化并自动同步\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\r\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\r\nimport { CursorDatabaseReader } from './database-reader';\r\nimport { ConversationBuilder } from './conversation-builder';\r\nimport { MarkdownGenerator } from './markdown-generator';\r\nimport { HistorySaver } from './history-saver';\r\nimport { WorkspaceFilter } from './workspace-filter';\r\n\r\nexport class DatabaseWatcher {\r\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\r\n    private dbPath: string;\r\n    private lastSync: number = 0;\r\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\r\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\r\n    private workspaceFilter: WorkspaceFilter;\r\n    \r\n    constructor(dbPath: string, workspaceRoot: string) {\r\n        this.dbPath = dbPath;\r\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\r\n        this.workspaceFilter = new WorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 启动监听\r\n     */\r\n    start(): void {\r\n        // 1. 立即执行一次同步\r\n        this.syncNow();\r\n        \r\n        // 2. 监听数据库文件变化\r\n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(this.dbPath, {\r\n            persistent: true,\r\n            ignoreInitial: true\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        this.watcher.on('change', () => {\r\n            this.scheduleSync();\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        // 3. 定时轮询（兜底，每 2 分钟）\r\n        setInterval(() => {\r\n            this.syncNow();\r\n        }, 120000); // 2 分钟\r\n        \r\n        console.log('Database watcher started');\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 停止监听\r\n     */\r\n    stop(): void {\r\n        if (this.watcher) {\r\n            this.watcher.close();\r\n        }\r\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\r\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 调度同步（防抖）\r\n     */\r\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\r\n        // 防抖：2 秒内只执行一次\r\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\r\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\r\n            this.syncNow();\r\n        }, 2000);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 立即同步\r\n     */\r\n    syncNow(): void {\r\n        const now = Date.now();\r\n        \r\n        // 避免过于频繁的同步\r\n        if (now - this.lastSync < 1000) {\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        this.lastSync = now;\r\n        \r\n        this.performSync().catch(error => {\r\n            console.error('Sync failed:', error);\r\n        });\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 执行同步\r\n     */\r\n    private async performSync(): Promise<void> {\r\n        const reader = new CursorDatabaseReader(this.dbPath);\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            // 获取所有 composer\r\n            const composers = reader.getAllComposers();\r\n            \r\n            console.log(`Found ${composers.length} composers`);\r\n            \r\n            for (const composer of composers) {\r\n                // 只处理属于当前工作区的对话\r\n                const belongsToWorkspace = this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(\r\n                    composer,\r\n                    reader\r\n                );\r\n                if (!belongsToWorkspace) {\r\n                    continue;\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                // 获取 bubble IDs\r\n                const bubbleIds = (composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [])\r\n                    .map(h => h.bubbleId);\r\n                \r\n                if (bubbleIds.length === 0) continue;\r\n                \r\n                // 获取 bubbles\r\n                const bubbles = reader.getComposerBubbles(composer.composerId, bubbleIds);\r\n                \r\n                // 构建对话\r\n                const builder = new ConversationBuilder();\r\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(composer, bubbles);\r\n                \r\n                if (messages.length === 0) continue;\r\n                \r\n                // 生成 Markdown\r\n                const generator = new MarkdownGenerator();\r\n                const markdown = generator.generate(composer, messages);\r\n                \r\n                // 保存\r\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\r\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\r\n                \r\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir);\r\n                await saver.save(composer, markdown);\r\n            }\r\n        } finally {\r\n            reader.close();\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n",
```

```json
{
  "contents": "import { ToolFormerData, ToolUseBlock } from './types';\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 将 toolFormerData 转换为 Markdown 块\r\n */\r\nexport function formatToolUse(toolData?: ToolFormerData | null): ToolUseBlock | null {\r\n    if (!toolData || !toolData.name) return null;\r\n\r\n    const args = parseJson(toolData.rawArgs, toolData.params ?? {});\r\n    const result = parseJson(toolData.result, undefined);\r\n    const toolType = mapToolType(toolData.name);\r\n    const summary = buildSummary(toolData.name, args, result);\r\n\r\n    let markdown = `<tool-use data-tool-type=\"${toolType}\" data-tool-name=\"${toolData.name}\">\\n`;\r\n    markdown += '<details><summary>';\r\n    markdown += `Tool use: **${toolData.name}**${summary ? ` • ${summary}` : ''}`;\r\n    markdown += '</summary>\\n\\n';\r\n\r\n    if (toolData.status) {\r\n        markdown += `_Status: ${toolData.status}_\\n\\n`;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    if (args && Object.keys(args).length > 0) {\r\n        markdown += '**Args**\\n';\r\n        markdown += '```json\\n';\r\n        markdown += JSON.stringify(args, null, 2);\r\n        markdown += '\\n```\\n\\n';\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    if (result !== undefined) {\r\n        markdown += '**Result**\\n';\r\n        markdown += '```json\\n';\r\n        markdown += JSON.stringify(result, null, 2);\r\n        markdown += '\\n```\\n';\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    markdown += '</details>\\n';\r\n    markdown += '</tool-use>';\r\n\r\n    return { name: toolData.name, markdown };\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction parseJson<T = any>(raw: any, fallback: any = {}): T {\r\n    if (raw === undefined || raw === null) return fallback as T;\r\n    if (typeof raw !== 'string') return (raw as T) ?? fallback;\r\n    try {\r\n        return JSON.parse(raw) as T;\r\n    } catch {\r\n        return fallback as T;\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction mapToolType(name: string): string {\r\n    const mapping: Record<string, string> = {\r\n        grep: 'search',\r\n        codebase_search: 'search',\r\n        web_search: 'search',\r\n        glob_file_search: 'search',\r\n        list_dir: 'generic',\r\n        read_file: 'read',\r\n        run_terminal_cmd: 'terminal',\r\n        write: 'write',\r\n        search_replace: 'edit',\r\n        todo_write: 'todo',\r\n        memory: 'memory',\r\n    };\r\n    return mapping[name] || 'generic';\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction buildSummary(name: string, args: any, result: any): string {\r\n    switch (name) {\r\n        case 'grep':\r\n            return `Grep for \"${args?.pattern ?? ''}\" in \"${args?.path ?? ''}\" • ${result?.matches ?? 0} matches`;\r\n        case 'list_dir':\r\n            return `Listed directory ${args?.target_directory ?? ''} • ${result?.count ?? (result?.items?.length ?? 0) ?? 0} results`;\r\n        case 'read_file':\r\n            return `Read file: ${args?.target_file ?? ''}`;\r\n        case 'web_search':\r\n            return `Web search for \"${args?.query ?? ''}\" • ${(result?.results?.length ?? 0)} results`;\r\n        case 'codebase_search':\r\n            return `Code search for \"${args?.query ?? ''}\"`;\r\n        case 'run_terminal_cmd':\r\n            return `Run command: ${args?.command ?? ''}`;\r\n        case 'glob_file_search':\r\n            return `Glob search \"${args?.glob_pattern ?? ''}\" • ${(result?.files?.length ?? 0)} files`;\r\n        case 'write':\r\n            return args?.target_file ? `Edit file: ${args.target_file}` : '';\r\n        case 'search_replace':\r\n            return `Search/replace in ${args?.target_file ?? ''}`;\r\n        default:\r\n            return '';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n",
```

```json
  "contents": "import { ComposerData, Bubble } from './types';\r\nimport { CursorDatabaseReader } from './database-reader';\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * WorkspaceFilter filters composers so we only export chats\r\n * that belong to the currently open workspace.\r\n */\r\nexport class WorkspaceFilter {\r\n    private currentWorkspacePath: string;\r\n\r\n    constructor(workspacePath: string) {\r\n        this.currentWorkspacePath = this.normalizePath(workspacePath || '');\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * Returns true if the composer belongs to the current workspace.\r\n     */\r\n    belongsToCurrentWorkspace(\r\n        composer: ComposerData,\r\n        reader: CursorDatabaseReader\r\n    ): boolean {\r\n        if (!this.currentWorkspacePath) {\r\n            return false;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        const headers = composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [];\r\n        if (headers.length === 0) {\r\n            return false;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        const firstBubbleId = headers[0].bubbleId;\r\n        const bubbles = reader.getComposerBubbles(composer.composerId, [firstBubbleId]);\r\n        if (bubbles.length === 0) {\r\n            return false;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        const bubble = bubbles[0] as Bubble & { workspaceProjectDir?: string };\r\n\r\n        // Prefer workspaceUris when available\r\n        if (bubble.workspaceUris && bubble.workspaceUris.length > 0) {\r\n            const bubbleWorkspace = this.uriToPath(bubble.workspaceUris[0]);\r\n            if (bubbleWorkspace && this.pathsMatch(bubbleWorkspace, this.currentWorkspacePath)) {\r\n                return true;\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // Fallback to workspaceProjectDir\r\n        if ((bubble as any).workspaceProjectDir) {\r\n            const bubbleWorkspace = this.normalizePath((bubble as any).workspaceProjectDir);\r\n            if (bubbleWorkspace && this.pathsMatch(bubbleWorkspace, this.currentWorkspacePath)) {\r\n                return true;\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        return false;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * Convert a file:// URI to a filesystem path.\r\n     */\r\n    private uriToPath(uri: string): string {\r\n        try {\r\n            const decoded = decodeURIComponent(uri);\r\n            let fsPath = decoded.replace(/^file:\\/\\/\\//, '');\r\n\r\n            // Windows drive letters are URL encoded (e.g., d%3A)\r\n            if (process.platform === 'win32') {\r\n                fsPath = fsPath.replace(/%3A/gi, ':');\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            return this.normalizePath(fsPath);\r\n        } catch {\r\n            return '';\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * Normalize paths for reliable comparison.\r\n     */\r\n    private normalizePath(filepath: string): string {\r\n        if (!filepath) return '';\r\n\r\n        let normalized = filepath.replace(/\\\\/g, '/');\r\n\r\n        if (process.platform === 'win32') {\r\n            normalized = normalized.toLowerCase();\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // remove trailing slash\r\n        normalized = normalized.replace(/\\/$/, '');\r\n\r\n        return normalized;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    private pathsMatch(path1: string, path2: string): boolean {\r\n        return this.normalizePath(path1) === this.normalizePath(path2);\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n",
```

```json
  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\r\n * 数据库监听器\r\n * 监听 Cursor 数据库变化并自动同步\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\r\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\r\nimport { CursorDatabaseReader } from './database-reader';\r\nimport { ConversationBuilder } from './conversation-builder';\r\nimport { MarkdownGenerator } from './markdown-generator';\r\nimport { HistorySaver } from './history-saver';\r\nimport { WorkspaceFilter } from './workspace-filter';\r\nimport { createTranslator, LocaleSetting, Translator } from './i18n';\r\n\r\nexport class DatabaseWatcher {\r\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\r\n    private dbPath: string;\r\n    private lastSync: number = 0;\r\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\r\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\r\n    private workspaceFilter: WorkspaceFilter;\r\n    private t: Translator;\r\n    \r\n    constructor(dbPath: string, workspaceRoot: string, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting) {\r\n        this.dbPath = dbPath;\r\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\r\n        this.workspaceFilter = new WorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\r\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 启动监听\r\n     */\r\n    start(): void {\r\n        // 1. 立即执行一次同步\r\n        this.syncNow();\r\n        \r\n        // 2. 监听数据库文件变化\r\n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(this.dbPath, {\r\n            persistent: true,\r\n            ignoreInitial: true\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        this.watcher.on('change', () => {\r\n            this.scheduleSync();\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        // 3. 定时轮询（兜底，每 2 分钟）\r\n        setInterval(() => {\r\n            this.syncNow();\r\n        }, 120000); // 2 分钟\r\n        \r\n        console.log('Database watcher started');\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 停止监听\r\n     */\r\n    stop(): void {\r\n        if (this.watcher) {\r\n            this.watcher.close();\r\n        }\r\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\r\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 调度同步（防抖）\r\n     */\r\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\r\n        // 防抖：2 秒内只执行一次\r\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\r\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\r\n            this.syncNow();\r\n        }, 2000);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 立即同步\r\n     */\r\n    syncNow(): void {\r\n        const now = Date.now();\r\n        \r\n        // 避免过于频繁的同步\r\n        if (now - this.lastSync < 1000) {\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        this.lastSync = now;\r\n        \r\n        this.performSync().catch(error => {\r\n            console.error('Sync failed:', error);\r\n        });\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 执行同步\r\n     */\r\n    private async performSync(): Promise<void> {\r\n        const reader = new CursorDatabaseReader(this.dbPath);\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            // 获取所有 composer\r\n            const composers = reader.getAllComposers();\r\n            \r\n            console.log(`Found ${composers.length} composers`);\r\n            \r\n            for (const composer of composers) {\r\n                // 只处理属于当前工作区的对话\r\n                const belongsToWorkspace = this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(\r\n                    composer,\r\n                    reader\r\n                );\r\n                if (!belongsToWorkspace) {\r\n                    continue;\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                // 获取 bubble IDs\r\n                const bubbleIds = (composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [])\r\n                    .map(h => h.bubbleId);\r\n                \r\n                if (bubbleIds.length === 0) continue;\r\n                \r\n                // 获取 bubbles\r\n                const bubbles = reader.getComposerBubbles(composer.composerId, bubbleIds);\r\n                \r\n                // 构建对话\r\n                const builder = new ConversationBuilder(this.t);\r\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(composer, bubbles);\r\n                \r\n                if (messages.length === 0) continue;\r\n                \r\n                // 生成 Markdown\r\n                const generator = new MarkdownGenerator(this.t);\r\n                const markdown = generator.generate(composer, messages);\r\n                \r\n                // 保存\r\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\r\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\r\n                \r\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir);\r\n                await saver.save(composer, markdown);\r\n            }\r\n        } finally {\r\n            reader.close();\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n"
```

```json
  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\r\n * 对话数据重组器\r\n * 将 Composer 和 Bubble 数据转换为统一的消息格式\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport { ComposerData, Bubble, Message, AIResponseBubble, ToolUseBlock } from './types';\r\nimport { formatToolUse } from './tool-use-formatter';\r\nimport { Translator } from './i18n';\r\n\r\nexport class ConversationBuilder {\r\n    constructor(private t: Translator) {}\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 从 Composer 构建完整对话\r\n     */\r\n    buildConversation(\r\n        composer: ComposerData,\r\n        bubbles: Bubble[]\r\n    ): Message[] {\r\n        const messages: Message[] = [];\r\n        const bubbleMap = new Map<string, Bubble>();\r\n        \r\n        // 创建 bubble 映射\r\n        for (const bubble of bubbles) {\r\n            bubbleMap.set(bubble.bubbleId, bubble);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 按顺序处理\r\n        const headers = composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [];\r\n        \r\n        for (const header of headers) {\r\n            const bubble = bubbleMap.get(header.bubbleId);\r\n            if (!bubble) continue;\r\n            \r\n            if (header.type === 1 && bubble.type === 1) {\r\n                // 用户消息\r\n                messages.push({\r\n                    id: bubble.bubbleId,\r\n                    type: 'user',\r\n                    text: bubble.text || '',\r\n                    timestamp: bubble.createdAt,\r\n                    modelName: bubble.modelInfo?.modelName,\r\n                    mode: this.getMode(bubble.unifiedMode)\r\n                });\r\n            } else if (header.type === 2 && bubble.type === 2) {\r\n                // AI 响应\r\n                const toolUse = this.extractToolUse(bubble);\r\n                const toolUses: ToolUseBlock[] | undefined = toolUse ? [toolUse] : undefined;\r\n\r\n                messages.push({\r\n                    id: bubble.bubbleId,\r\n                    type: 'assistant',\r\n                    text: bubble.text || '',\r\n                    thinking: bubble.thinking?.text,\r\n                    timestamp: bubble.createdAt,\r\n                    modelName: bubble.modelInfo?.modelName,\r\n                    mode: this.getMode(bubble.unifiedMode),\r\n                    toolResults: bubble.toolResults,\r\n                    toolUses\r\n                });\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return messages;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取模式名称\r\n     */\r\n    private getMode(unifiedMode?: number): string {\r\n        switch (unifiedMode) {\r\n            case 1: return this.t('mode.chat');\r\n            case 2: return this.t('mode.agent');\r\n            default: return '';\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 提取工具调用 Markdown\r\n     */\r\n    private extractToolUse(bubble: AIResponseBubble): ToolUseBlock | null {\r\n        // Cursor 工具调用 capabilityType 为 15\r\n        if (bubble.capabilityType !== 15) {\r\n            return null;\r\n        }\r\n        return formatToolUse(bubble.toolFormerData, this.t);\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n"
}
```

```json
  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\r\n * Markdown 生成器\r\n * 将消息数组转换为格式化的 Markdown 文档\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport { ComposerData, Message } from './types';\r\nimport { Translator } from './i18n';\r\n\r\nexport class MarkdownGenerator {\r\n    constructor(private t: Translator) {}\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成 Markdown 文档\r\n     */\r\n    generate(\r\n        composer: ComposerData,\r\n        messages: Message[]\r\n    ): string {\r\n        let markdown = '';\r\n        \r\n        // 文件头\r\n        markdown += this.generateHeader(composer);\r\n        markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n        \r\n        // 标题\r\n        const title = composer.name || this.t('markdown.untitled');\r\n        markdown += `# ${title} (${this.formatDate(composer.createdAt)})\\n\\n`;\r\n        \r\n        // 消息\r\n        let previousSpeaker: string | null = null;\r\n        \r\n        for (const message of messages) {\r\n            // 如果发言者改变，添加发言者标记\r\n            if (message.type !== previousSpeaker) {\r\n                markdown += this.generateSpeakerHeader(message);\r\n                markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 思考过程（如果有）\r\n            if (message.thinking) {\r\n                markdown += this.generateThinking(message.thinking);\r\n                markdown += '\\n\\n---\\n\\n';\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 消息内容\r\n            markdown += message.text;\r\n            markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n            \r\n            // 工具调用（如果有）\r\n            if (message.toolUses && message.toolUses.length > 0) {\r\n                for (const toolUse of message.toolUses) {\r\n                    markdown += toolUse.markdown;\r\n                    markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            // 工具调用结果（如果有）\r\n            if (message.toolResults && message.toolResults.length > 0) {\r\n                markdown += this.generateToolResults(message.toolResults);\r\n                markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            markdown += '---\\n\\n';\r\n            \r\n            previousSpeaker = message.type;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return markdown;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成文件头\r\n     */\r\n    private generateHeader(composer: ComposerData): string {\r\n        return `<!-- ${this.t('markdown.generatedBy')} -->\r\n<!-- ${this.t('markdown.cursorSession', {\r\n    id: composer.composerId,\r\n    date: this.formatDate(composer.createdAt)\r\n})} -->`;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成发言者标记\r\n     */\r\n    private generateSpeakerHeader(message: Message): string {\r\n        if (message.type === 'user') {\r\n            return `_**${this.t('speaker.user', { time: this.formatDate(message.timestamp) })}**_`;\r\n        } else {\r\n            const parts = [];\r\n            if (message.modelName) {\r\n                parts.push(`model ${message.modelName}`);\r\n            }\r\n            if (message.mode) {\r\n                parts.push(`mode ${message.mode}`);\r\n            }\r\n            const info = parts.length > 0 ? ` (${parts.join(', ')})` : '';\r\n            return `_**${this.t('speaker.agent', { info })}**_`;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成思考过程\r\n     */\r\n    private generateThinking(thinking: string): string {\r\n        return `<think><details><summary>${this.t('section.thoughtProcess')}</summary>\r\n\r\n${thinking}\r\n\r\n</details></think>`;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成工具调用结果\r\n     */\r\n    private generateToolResults(toolResults: Array<{ name: string; result: any }>): string {\r\n        let markdown = '';\r\n        \r\n        for (const tool of toolResults) {\r\n            markdown += `<tool-use>\\n<details><summary>Tool: ${tool.name}</summary>\\n\\n`;\r\n            markdown += '```json\\n';\r\n            markdown += JSON.stringify(tool.result, null, 2);\r\n            markdown += '\\n```\\n';\r\n            markdown += `</details>\\n</tool-use>\\n`;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return markdown;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 格式化日期为 UTC\r\n     */\r\n    private formatDate(isoDate: string): string {\r\n        const date = new Date(isoDate);\r\n        const year = date.getUTCFullYear();\r\n        const month = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const day = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const hour = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const minute = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        \r\n        return `${year}-${month}-${day} ${hour}:${minute}Z`;\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n"
}
```

  "contentsAfterEdit": "import { ToolFormerData, ToolUseBlock } from './types';\r\nimport { Translator } from './i18n';\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 将 toolFormerData 转换为 Markdown 块\r\n */\r\nexport function formatToolUse(toolData: ToolFormerData | null | undefined, t: Translator): ToolUseBlock | null {\r\n    if (!toolData || !toolData.name) return null;\r\n\r\n    const args = parseJson(toolData.rawArgs, toolData.params ?? {});\r\n    const result = parseJson(toolData.result, undefined);\r\n    const toolType = mapToolType(toolData.name);\r\n    const summary = buildSummary(toolData.name, args, result, t);\r\n\r\n    let markdown = `<tool-use data-tool-type=\"${toolType}\" data-tool-name=\"${toolData.name}\">\\n`;\r\n    markdown += '<details><summary>';\r\n    markdown += `${t('toolUse.title', { name: toolData.name })}${summary ? ` • ${summary}` : ''}`;\r\n    markdown += '</summary>\\n\\n';\r\n\r\n    if (toolData.status) {\r\n        markdown += `_${t('toolUse.status', { status: toolData.status })}_\\n\\n`;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    if (args && Object.keys(args).length > 0) {\r\n        markdown += `**${t('toolUse.args')}**\\n`;\r\n        markdown += '```json\\n';\r\n        markdown += JSON.stringify(args, null, 2);\r\n        markdown += '\\n```\\n\\n';\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    if (result !== undefined) {\r\n        markdown += `**${t('toolUse.result')}**\\n`;\r\n        markdown += '```json\\n';\r\n        markdown += JSON.stringify(result, null, 2);\r\n        markdown += '\\n```\\n';\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    markdown += '</details>\\n';\r\n    markdown += '</tool-use>';\r\n\r\n    return { name: toolData.name, markdown };\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction parseJson<T = any>(raw: any, fallback: any = {}): T {\r\n    if (raw === undefined || raw === null) return fallback as T;\r\n    if (typeof raw !== 'string') return (raw as T) ?? fallback;\r\n    try {\r\n        return JSON.parse(raw) as T;\r\n    } catch {\r\n        return fallback as T;\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction mapToolType(name: string): string {\r\n    const mapping: Record<string, string> = {\r\n        grep: 'search',\r\n        codebase_search: 'search',\r\n        web_search: 'search',\r\n        glob_file_search: 'search',\r\n        list_dir: 'generic',\r\n        read_file: 'read',\r\n        run_terminal_cmd: 'terminal',\r\n        write: 'write',\r\n        search_replace: 'edit',\r\n        todo_write: 'todo',\r\n        memory: 'memory',\r\n    };\r\n    return mapping[name] || 'generic';\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction buildSummary(name: string, args: any, result: any, t: Translator): string {\r\n    switch (name) {\r\n        case 'grep':\r\n            return t('toolUse.summary.grep', {\r\n                pattern: args?.pattern ?? '',\r\n                path: args?.path ?? '',\r\n                matches: result?.matches ?? 0\r\n            });\r\n        case 'list_dir':\r\n            return t('toolUse.summary.list_dir', {\r\n                dir: args?.target_directory ?? '',\r\n                count: result?.count ?? (result?.items?.length ?? 0) ?? 0\r\n            });\r\n        case 'read_file':\r\n            return t('toolUse.summary.read_file', { file: args?.target_file ?? '' });\r\n        case 'web_search':\r\n            return t('toolUse.summary.web_search', {\r\n                query: args?.query ?? '',\r\n                count: (result?.results?.length ?? 0)\r\n            });\r\n        case 'codebase_search':\r\n            return t('toolUse.summary.codebase_search', { query: args?.query ?? '' });\r\n        case 'run_terminal_cmd':\r\n            return t('toolUse.summary.run_terminal_cmd', { command: args?.command ?? '' });\r\n        case 'glob_file_search':\r\n            return t('toolUse.summary.glob_file_search', {\r\n                pattern: args?.glob_pattern ?? '',\r\n                count: (result?.files?.length ?? 0)\r\n            });\r\n        case 'write':\r\n            return args?.target_file ? t('toolUse.summary.write', { file: args.target_file }) : '';\r\n        case 'search_replace':\r\n            return t('toolUse.summary.search_replace', { file: args?.target_file ?? '' });\r\n        default:\r\n            return '';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n"
}

  "contentsAfterEdit": "# Cursor Chat History\r\n\r\nA proprietary VS Code extension that automatically saves your Cursor AI chat history to Markdown files. Distribution is limited to authorized users; do not share the source or binaries externally.\r\n\r\n## Features\r\n\r\n- ✅ **Automatic Monitoring**: Watches Cursor's database for changes\r\n- ✅ **Complete History**: Captures user messages, AI responses, and thinking processes\r\n- ✅ **Markdown Format**: Saves conversations in readable, version-control-friendly Markdown\r\n- ✅ **Timestamped Files**: Organizes files by date and conversation title\r\n- ✅ **Git Friendly**: Perfect for tracking AI conversations over time\r\n- ✅ **Multi-language**: UI and exported Markdown support English and Chinese\r\n\r\n## Installation\r\n\r\n### From Source (authorized users)\r\n\r\n1. Obtain access to the private repository through your authorized channel\r\n2. Run `npm install` to install dependencies\r\n   - The postinstall script will automatically download the correct binaries for your system\r\n   - If you encounter issues, run `npm run setup` manually\r\n3. Run `npm run compile` to build the extension\r\n4. Press F5 in VS Code to launch the extension in development mode\r\n\r\n> **Note**: This extension uses `better-sqlite3`, a native module. The installation script automatically handles downloading the correct prebuilt binaries for Electron. See [INSTALL_NOTES.md](INSTALL_NOTES.md) for troubleshooting.\r\n\r\n### From VSIX\r\n\r\n1. Download the `.vsix` file from releases\r\n2. In VS Code, go to Extensions view\r\n3. Click the `...` menu and select \"Install from VSIX...\"\r\n4. Select the downloaded file\r\n\r\n## Usage\r\n\r\nThe extension activates automatically when you open a workspace in Cursor.\r\n\r\n### Automatic Saving\r\n\r\nBy default, the extension automatically monitors your Cursor chat history and saves it to `.llm-chat-history/history/` in your workspace root.\r\n\r\n### Manual Save\r\n\r\nYou can manually trigger a save by:\r\n1. Opening the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+P)\r\n2. Running the command: \"LLMChatHisotry: Save Chat History Now\"\r\n\r\n## Configuration\r\n\r\nConfigure the extension in your VS Code settings:\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".llm-chat-history/history\",\r\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true,\r\n  \"chatHistory.locale\": \"auto\"\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### Settings\r\n\r\n- `chatHistory.autoSave` (default: `true`): Enable automatic saving of chat history\r\n- `chatHistory.outputDirectory` (default: `.llm-chat-history/history`): Directory to save history files\r\n- `chatHistory.useUTC` (default: `true`): Use UTC timezone for timestamps\r\n- `chatHistory.locale` (default: `auto`): Language for UI/Markdown (`auto`, `en`, `zh`)\r\n\r\n## Output Format\r\n\r\nConversations are saved as Markdown files with the following format:\r\n\r\n```markdown\r\n<!-- Generated by Chat History Extension -->\r\n<!-- Cursor Session {id} ({timestamp}) -->\r\n\r\n# Conversation Title (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\r\n\r\n_**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\r\n\r\nUser's question here\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n_**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\r\n\r\n<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>\r\nAI's thinking process (if available)\r\n</details></think>\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\nAI's response here\r\n\r\n---\r\n```\r\n\r\n### File Naming\r\n\r\nFiles are named with the pattern: `YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MMZ-{title}.md`\r\n\r\nExample: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-implementing-chat-history.md`\r\n\r\n## Requirements\r\n\r\n- VS Code / Cursor 1.93.0 or higher\r\n- Active Cursor installation with chat history\r\n\r\n## Database Location\r\n\r\nThe extension reads from Cursor's SQLite database:\r\n\r\n- **Windows**: `%APPDATA%\\Roaming\\Cursor\\User\\globalStorage\\state.vscdb`\r\n- **macOS**: `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\r\n- **Linux**: `~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\r\n\r\n## Known Issues\r\n\r\n- The extension requires a workspace to be open\r\n- Database must be accessible (not locked by another process)\r\n- **Windows**: First-time installation may require Visual Studio Build Tools if prebuilt binaries are unavailable. See [QUICK_START.md](QUICK_START.md#故障排除) for solutions.\r\n\r\n## Usage Rights\r\n\r\nThis is commercial, proprietary software. All rights are reserved, and redistribution or publication without prior written permission is prohibited.\r\n\r\n## Support\r\n\r\nFor support, contact the internal product team through the approved channel.\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n**Note**: This extension is not officially affiliated with Cursor or Anysphere.\r\n\r\n\r\n"

```json
{
  "contents": "/**\r\n * Markdown 生成器\r\n * 将消息数组转换为格式化的 Markdown 文档\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport { ComposerData, Message } from './types';\r\nimport { Translator } from './i18n';\r\n\r\nexport class MarkdownGenerator {\r\n    constructor(private t: Translator) {}\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成 Markdown 文档\r\n     */\r\n    generate(\r\n        composer: ComposerData,\r\n        messages: Message[]\r\n    ): string {\r\n        let markdown = '';\r\n        \r\n        // 文件头\r\n        markdown += this.generateHeader(composer);\r\n        markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n        \r\n        // 标题\r\n        const title = composer.name || this.t('markdown.untitled');\r\n        markdown += `# ${title} (${this.formatDate(composer.createdAt)})\\n\\n`;\r\n        \r\n        // 消息\r\n        let previousSpeaker: string | null = null;\r\n        \r\n        for (const message of messages) {\r\n            // 如果发言者改变，添加发言者标记\r\n            if (message.type !== previousSpeaker) {\r\n                markdown += this.generateSpeakerHeader(message);\r\n                markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 思考过程（如果有）\r\n            if (message.thinking) {\r\n                markdown += this.generateThinking(message.thinking);\r\n                markdown += '\\n\\n---\\n\\n';\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 消息内容\r\n            markdown += message.text;\r\n            markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n            \r\n            // 工具调用（如果有）\r\n            if (message.toolUses && message.toolUses.length > 0) {\r\n                for (const toolUse of message.toolUses) {\r\n                    markdown += toolUse.markdown;\r\n                    markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            // 工具调用结果（如果有）\r\n            if (message.toolResults && message.toolResults.length > 0) {\r\n                markdown += this.generateToolResults(message.toolResults);\r\n                markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            markdown += '---\\n\\n';\r\n            \r\n            previousSpeaker = message.type;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return markdown;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成文件头\r\n     */\r\n    private generateHeader(composer: ComposerData): string {\r\n        return `<!-- ${this.t('markdown.generatedBy')} -->\r\n<!-- ${this.t('markdown.cursorSession', {\r\n    id: composer.composerId,\r\n    date: this.formatDate(composer.createdAt)\r\n})} -->`;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成发言者标记\r\n     */\r\n    private generateSpeakerHeader(message: Message): string {\r\n        if (message.type === 'user') {\r\n            return `_**${this.t('speaker.user', { time: this.formatDate(message.timestamp) })}**_`;\r\n        } else {\r\n            const parts = [];\r\n            if (message.modelName) {\r\n                parts.push(`model ${message.modelName}`);\r\n            }\r\n            if (message.mode) {\r\n                parts.push(`mode ${message.mode}`);\r\n            }\r\n            const info = parts.length > 0 ? ` (${parts.join(', ')})` : '';\r\n            return `_**${this.t('speaker.agent', { info })}**_`;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成思考过程\r\n     */\r\n    private generateThinking(thinking: string): string {\r\n        return `<think><details><summary>${this.t('section.thoughtProcess')}</summary>\r\n\r\n${thinking}\r\n\r\n</details></think>`;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成工具调用结果\r\n     */\r\n    private generateToolResults(toolResults: Array<{ name: string; result: any }>): string {\r\n        let markdown = '';\r\n        \r\n        for (const tool of toolResults) {\r\n            markdown += `<tool-use>\\n<details><summary>Tool: ${tool.name}</summary>\\n\\n`;\r\n            markdown += '```json\\n';\r\n            markdown += JSON.stringify(tool.result, null, 2);\r\n            markdown += '\\n```\\n';\r\n            markdown += `</details>\\n</tool-use>\\n`;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return markdown;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 格式化日期为 UTC\r\n     */\r\n    private formatDate(isoDate: string): string {\r\n        const date = new Date(isoDate);\r\n        const year = date.getUTCFullYear();\r\n        const month = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const day = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const hour = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const minute = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        \r\n        return `${year}-${month}-${day} ${hour}:${minute}Z`;\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n",

}
```

```json
{
  "contents": "import { ToolFormerData, ToolUseBlock } from './types';\r\nimport { Translator } from './i18n';\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 将 toolFormerData 转换为 Markdown 块\r\n */\r\nexport function formatToolUse(toolData: ToolFormerData | null | undefined, t: Translator): ToolUseBlock | null {\r\n    if (!toolData || !toolData.name) return null;\r\n\r\n    const args = parseJson(toolData.rawArgs, toolData.params ?? {});\r\n    const result = parseJson(toolData.result, undefined);\r\n    const toolType = mapToolType(toolData.name);\r\n    const summary = buildSummary(toolData.name, args, result, t);\r\n\r\n    let markdown = `<tool-use data-tool-type=\"${toolType}\" data-tool-name=\"${toolData.name}\">\\n`;\r\n    markdown += '<details><summary>';\r\n    markdown += `${t('toolUse.title', { name: toolData.name })}${summary ? ` • ${summary}` : ''}`;\r\n    markdown += '</summary>\\n\\n';\r\n\r\n    if (toolData.status) {\r\n        markdown += `_${t('toolUse.status', { status: toolData.status })}_\\n\\n`;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    if (args && Object.keys(args).length > 0) {\r\n        markdown += `**${t('toolUse.args')}**\\n`;\r\n        markdown += '```json\\n';\r\n        markdown += JSON.stringify(args, null, 2);\r\n        markdown += '\\n```\\n\\n';\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    if (result !== undefined) {\r\n        markdown += `**${t('toolUse.result')}**\\n`;\r\n        markdown += '```json\\n';\r\n        markdown += JSON.stringify(result, null, 2);\r\n        markdown += '\\n```\\n';\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    markdown += '</details>\\n';\r\n    markdown += '</tool-use>';\r\n\r\n    return { name: toolData.name, markdown };\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction parseJson<T = any>(raw: any, fallback: any = {}): T {\r\n    if (raw === undefined || raw === null) return fallback as T;\r\n    if (typeof raw !== 'string') return (raw as T) ?? fallback;\r\n    try {\r\n        return JSON.parse(raw) as T;\r\n    } catch {\r\n        return fallback as T;\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction mapToolType(name: string): string {\r\n    const mapping: Record<string, string> = {\r\n        grep: 'search',\r\n        codebase_search: 'search',\r\n        web_search: 'search',\r\n        glob_file_search: 'search',\r\n        list_dir: 'generic',\r\n        read_file: 'read',\r\n        run_terminal_cmd: 'terminal',\r\n        write: 'write',\r\n        search_replace: 'edit',\r\n        todo_write: 'todo',\r\n        memory: 'memory',\r\n    };\r\n    return mapping[name] || 'generic';\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction buildSummary(name: string, args: any, result: any, t: Translator): string {\r\n    switch (name) {\r\n        case 'grep':\r\n            return t('toolUse.summary.grep', {\r\n                pattern: args?.pattern ?? '',\r\n                path: args?.path ?? '',\r\n                matches: result?.matches ?? 0\r\n            });\r\n        case 'list_dir':\r\n            return t('toolUse.summary.list_dir', {\r\n                dir: args?.target_directory ?? '',\r\n                count: result?.count ?? (result?.items?.length ?? 0) ?? 0\r\n            });\r\n        case 'read_file':\r\n            return t('toolUse.summary.read_file', { file: args?.target_file ?? '' });\r\n        case 'web_search':\r\n            return t('toolUse.summary.web_search', {\r\n                query: args?.query ?? '' });\r\n        case 'run_terminal_cmd':\r\n            return t('toolUse.summary.run_terminal_cmd', { command: args?.command ?? - Added central translator with EN/ZH dictionaries and auto locale detection tied to VS Code language or `chatHistory.locale`.  
```
```1:74:src/i18n.ts
export type Translator = (key: keyof typeof messages['en'], params?: Record<string, any>) => string;
...
export function createTranslator(setting?: LocaleSetting): Translator {
    const locale = resolveLocale(setting);
    return (key, params = {}) => {
        const dict = messages[locale] || messages.en;
        const template = dict[key] ?? messages.en[key] ?? key;
        return template.replace(/\{(\w+)\}/g, (_, k) => String(params[k] ?? ''));
    };
}
```

- Wired translator through the extension pipeline so UI messages, conversation assembly, markdown headers/labels, modes, and tool-use blocks render in the selected language.  
```9:110:src/markdown-generator.ts
export class MarkdownGenerator {
    constructor(private t: Translator) {}
...
    private generateHeader(composer: ComposerData): string {
        return `<!-- ${this.t('markdown.generatedBy')} -->
<!-- ${this.t('markdown.cursorSession', {
    id: composer.composerId,
    date: this.formatDate(composer.createdAt)
})} -->`;
    }
...
    private generateSpeakerHeader(message: Message): string {
        if (message.type === 'user') {
            return `_**${this.t('speaker.user', { time: this.formatDate(message.timestamp) })}**_`;
        } else {
            ...
            return `_**${this.t('speaker.agent', { info })}**_`;
        }
    }
```

Opening the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+P)\n2. UTC timezone for timestamps\n- `chatHistory.locale` (default: `auto`): Language for UI/Markdown (`auto`, `en`, `zh`)\n\n## Output Format\n\nConversations are saved as Markdown files with the following Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\n- **Linux**: `~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\n\n## Known Issues\n\n- The extension requires a workspace to be open\n- Database must be   "resultForModel": "The file README.md has been updated.",
```json
  "contentsAfterEdit": "# LLM Chat History\n\nA proprietary VS Code extension that automatically saves your LLM chat history to Markdown files. Distribution is limited to authorized users; do not share the source or binaries externally.\n\n## Features\n\n- ✅ **Automatic Monitoring**: Watches Cursor's database for changes\n- ✅ **Complete History**: Captures user messages, AI responses, and thinking processes\n- ✅ **Markdown Format**: Saves conversations in readable, version-control-friendly Markdown\n- ✅ **Timestamped Files**: Organizes files by date and conversation title\n- ✅ **Git Friendly**: Perfect for tracking AI conversations over time\n- ✅ **Multi-language**: UI and exported Markdown support English and Chinese\n\n## Installation\n\n### From Source (authorized users)\n\n1. Obtain access to the private repository through your authorized channel\n2. Run `npm install` to install dependencies\n   - The postinstall script will automatically download the correct binaries for your system\n   - If you encounter issues, run `npm run setup` manually\n3. Run `npm run compile` to build the extension\n4. Press F5 in VS Code to launch the extension in development mode\n\n> **Note**: This extension uses `better-sqlite3`, a native module. The installation script automatically handles downloading the correct prebuilt binaries for Electron. See [INSTALL_NOTES.md](INSTALL_NOTES.md) for troubleshooting.\n\n### From VSIX\n\n1. Download the `.vsix` file from releases\n2. In VS Code, go to Extensions view\n3. Click the `...` menu and select \"Install from VSIX...\"\n4. Select the downloaded file\n\n## Usage\n\nThe extension activates automatically when you open a workspace in Cursor.\n\n### Automatic Saving\n\nBy default, the extension automatically monitors your Cursor chat history and saves it to `.llm-chat-history/history/` in your workspace root.\n\n### Manual Save\n\nYou can manually trigger a save by:\n1. Opening the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+P)\n2. Running the command: \"LLMChatHisotry: Save Chat History Now\"\n\n## Configuration\n\nConfigure the extension in your VS Code settings:\n\n```json\n{\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".llm-chat-history/history\",\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true,\n  \"chatHistory.locale\": \"auto\"\n}\n```\n\n### Settings\n\n- `chatHistory.autoSave` (default: `true`): Enable automatic saving of chat history\n- `chatHistory.outputDirectory` (default: `.llm-chat-history/history`): Directory to save history files\n- `chatHistory.useUTC` (default: `true`): Use UTC timezone for timestamps\n- `chatHistory.locale` (default: `auto`): Language for UI/Markdown (`auto`, `en`, `zh`)\n\n## Output Format\n\nConversations are saved as Markdown files with the following format:\n\n```markdown\n<!-- Generated by Chat History Extension -->\n<!-- Cursor Session {id} ({timestamp}) -->\n\n# Conversation Title (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\n\n_**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\n\nUser's question here\n\n---\n\n_**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\n\n<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>\nAI's thinking process (if available)\n</details></think>\n\n---\n\nAI's response here\n\n---\n```\n\n### File Naming\n\nFiles are named with the pattern: `YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MMZ-{title}.md`\n\nExample: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-implementing-chat-history.md`\n\n## Requirements\n\n- VS Code / Cursor 1.93.0 or higher\n- Active Cursor installation with chat history\n\n## Database Location\n\nThe extension reads from Cursor's SQLite database:\n\n- **Windows**: `%APPDATA%\\Roaming\\Cursor\\User\\globalStorage\\state.vscdb`\n- **macOS**: `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\n- **Linux**: `~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\n\n## Known Issues\n\n- The extension requires a workspace to be open\n- Database must be accessible (not locked by another process)\n- **Windows**: First-time installation may require Visual Studio Build Tools if prebuilt binaries are unavailable. See [QUICK_START.md](QUICK_START.md#故障排除) for solutions.\n\n## Usage Rights\n\nThis is commercial, proprietary software. All rights are reserved, and redistribution or publication without prior written permission is prohibited.\n\n## Support\n\nFor support, contact the internal product team through the approved channel.\n\n---\n\n**Note**: This extension is not officially affiliated with Cursor or Anysphere.\n\n\n"
}
```

```json
  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\n * 扩展主入口文件\n */\n\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport * as fs from 'fs';\nimport { DatabaseWatcher } from './database-watcher';\nimport { createTranslator } from './i18n';\n\n/**\n * 扩展激活时调用\n */\nexport function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {\n    console.log('LLM Chat History Extension activated');\n    \n    // 获取配置\n    const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n    const autoSave = config.get<boolean>('autoSave', true);\n    const localeSetting = config.get<string>('locale', 'auto') as any;\n    const t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n    \n    if (!autoSave) {\n        console.log('Auto-save disabled');\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    // 获取数据库路径\n    const dbPath = getCursorDatabasePath();\n    \n    // 检查数据库是否存在\n    if (!fs.existsSync(dbPath)) {\n        console.warn('Cursor database not found:', dbPath);\n        vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n            t('warning.dbNotFound')\n        );\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    // 检查是否有打开的工作区\n    if (!vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders || vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders.length === 0) {\n        console.warn('No workspace folder open');\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    // 工作区路径（使用第一个工作区）\n    const workspaceRoot = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath;\n    if (!workspaceRoot) {\n        console.warn('No workspace folder path resolved');\n        return;\n    }\n\n    // 启动监听\n    const watcher = new DatabaseWatcher(dbPath, workspaceRoot, localeSetting);\n    watcher.start();\n    \n    // 注册命令：手动保存\n    const saveCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.saveNow',\n        () => {\n            watcher.syncNow();\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage(t('info.saved'));\n        }\n    );\n    \n    context.subscriptions.push(saveCommand, {\n        dispose: () => watcher.stop()\n    });\n    \n    console.log('Cursor Chat History Extension ready');\n}\n\n/**\n * 扩展停用时调用\n */\nexport function deactivate() {\n    console.log('Cursor Chat History Extension deactivated');\n}\n\n/**\n * 获取 Cursor 数据库路径\n */\nfunction getCursorDatabasePath(): string {\n    const platform = process.platform;\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\n    \n    if (platform === 'win32') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'AppData/Roaming/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else {\n        // Linux\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            '.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    }\n}\n\n\n"
}
```

> 用户想要在 `.llm-chat-history` 目录下生成一个 `index.html` 文件，用来展示和浏览 Markdown 文档。需求包括：
> 1. 展示 Markdown 文档列表
> 2. 点击可弹窗查看详情
> 3. 可以拖到浏览器中直接查看
> 4. 支持本地搜索功能
>
> 关键点：
> - 这个 HTML 文件需要纯前端实现，不能依赖服务器
> - 需要能够读取本地的 markdown 文件列表
> - 需要渲染 markdown 内容
> - 需要搜索功能
>
> 但是有个问题：纯静态 HTML 文件（通过 file:// 协议打开）无法直接读取本地文件系统。需要：
> 1. 要么生成时把所有 MD 内容嵌入到 HTML 中
> 2. 要么使用 FileReader API，让用户手动选择文件
> 3. 要么在生成 HTML 时扫描所有 MD 文件，把内容嵌入 HTML
>
> 最实用的方案是：在保存历史记录时，同时更新 index.html，将所有 MD 文件的元数据和内容嵌入到 HTML 中。这样用户直接打开 HTML 就能看到所有内容。
>
> 我需要：
> 1. 创建一个 HTML 生成器模块
> 2. 在 DatabaseWatcher 或 HistorySaver 中调用它
> 3. 每次保存历史时更新 index.html
> 4. HTML 包含：
>
>
> 我将设计一个轻量级的解决方案，通过 TypeScript 模块实现静态 HTML 生成。核心思路是创建一个专门的索引生成器，将所有聊天历史 Markdown 文件转换为可交互的网页。关键实现包括文件扫描、数据嵌入和前端交互逻辑，确保用户可以方便地浏览和搜索历史记录。
>
> 为了优化渲染性能，我考虑引入 marked.js 作为轻量级的 Markdown 解析工具，通过 CDN 加载，无需额外依赖。这将显著提升 Markdown 内容的展示质量和可读性。
