     overflow-y: auto;\r\n            flex: 1;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .markdown-content {\r\n            line-height: 1.8;\r\n            word-wrap: break-word;\r\n            overflow-wrap: break-word;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .markdown-content > *:first-child {\r\n            margin-top: 0 !important;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .markdown-content > *:last-child {\r\n            margin-bottom: 0 !important;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .markdown-content h1,\r\n        .markdown-content h2,\r\n        .markdown-content h3 {\r\n            margin-top: 24px;\r\n            margin-bottom: 16px;\r\n            font-weight: 600;\r\n            color: #2c3e50;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .markdown-content h1 { font-size: 28px; }\r\n        .markdown-content h2 { font-size: 24px; }\r\n        .markdown-content h3 { font-size: 20px; }\r\n\r\n        .markdown-content p {\r\n            margin-bottom: 16px;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .markdown-content pre {\r\n            background: #f6f8fa;\r\n            padding: 16px;\r\n            border-radius: 6px;\r\n            overflow-x: auto;\r\n            margin-bottom: 16px;\r\n            border: 1px solid #e1e4e8;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .markdown-content code {\r\n            background: #f6f8fa;\r\n            padding: 2px 6px;\r\n            border-radius: 3px;\r\n            font-family: 'Consolas', 'Monaco', 'Courier New', monospace;\r\n            font-size: 13px;\r\n            color: #e83e8c;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .markdown-content pre code {\r\n            background: none;\r\n            padding: 0;\r\n            color: #333;\r\n            display: block;\r\n            line-height: 1.5;\r\n            white-space: pre;\r\n            word-wrap: normal;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /* JSON 特殊处理 */\r\n        .markdown-content pre code.language-json {\r\n            color: #032f62;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .markdown-content hr {\r\n            border: none;\r\n            border-top: 1px solid #e0e0e0;\r\n            margin: 24px 0;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .markdown-content blockquote {\r\n            border-left: 4px solid #4a90e2;\r\n            padding-left: 16px;\r\n            margin: 16px 0;\r\n            color: #666;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /* 用户/助手标记样式 */\r\n        .markdown-content p > em > strong {\r\n            color: #4a90e2;\r\n            font-style: normal;\r\n            font-size: 16px;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /* 表格样式 */\r\n        .markdown-content table {\r\n            border-collapse: collapse;\r\n            width: 100%;\r\n            margin: 16px 0;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .markdown-content th,\r\n        .markdown-content td {\r\n            border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;\r\n            padding: 8px 12px;\r\n            text-align: left;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .markdown-content th {\r\n            background: #f6f8fa;\r\n            font-weight: 600;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .markdown-content details {\r\n            margin: 16px 0;\r\n            padding: 12px;\r\n            background: #f9f9f9;\r\n            border-radius: 6px;\r\n            border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .markdown-content summary {\r\n            cursor: pointer;\r\n            font-weight: 600;\r\n            margin-bottom: 8px;\r\n            user-select: none;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /* 自定义标签样式 */\r\n        .markdown-content tool-use {\r\n            display: block;\r\n            margin: 16px 0;\r\n            padding: 12px;\r\n            background: #f0f7ff;\r\n            border-left: 4px solid #4a90e2;\r\n            border-radius: 4px;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .markdown-content tool-use[data-tool-type=\"search\"] {\r\n            background: #fff4e6;\r\n            border-left-color: #ff9800;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .markdown-content tool-use[data-tool-type=\"terminal\"] {\r\n            background: #f0f0f0;\r\n            border-left-color: #333;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .markdown-content tool-use[data-tool-type=\"write\"],\r\n        .markdown-content tool-use[data-tool-type=\"edit\"] {\r\n            background: #e8f5e9;\r\n            border-left-color: #4caf50;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .markdown-content think {\r\n            display: block;\r\n            margin: 16px 0;\r\n            padding: 12px;\r\n            background: #fff9e6;\r\n            border-left: 4px solid #ffa726;\r\n            border-radius: 4px;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .markdown-content think details {\r\n            background: transparent;\r\n            border: none;\r\n            padding: 0;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .markdown-content tool-use details {\r\n            background: transparent;\r\n            border: none;\r\n            padding: 0;\r\n            margin: 0;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .markdown-content tool-use summary,\r\n        .markdown-content think summary {\r\n            color: #2c3e50;\r\n            font-size: 14px;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /* 隐藏 HTML 注释 */\r\n        .markdown-content > :first-child:is(p):has(+ p:first-of-type) {\r\n            display: none;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /* 改善 details 的交互 */\r\n        .markdown-content details[open] {\r\n            padding-bottom: 8px;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .markdown-content details[open] > summary {\r\n            margin-bottom: 12px;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /* 链接样式 */\r\n        .markdown-content a {\r\n            color: #4a90e2;\r\n            text-decoration: none;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .markdown-content a:hover {\r\n            text-decoration: underline;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /* 列表样式 */\r\n        .markdown-content ul,\r\n        .markdown-content ol {\r\n            margin: 16px 0;\r\n            padding-left: 24px;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .markdown-content li {\r\n            margin: 8px 0;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .no-results {\r\n            text-align: center;\r\n            padding: 60px 20px;\r\n            color: #999;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .no-results-icon {\r\n            font-size: 48px;\r\n            margin-bottom: 16px;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        @media (max-width: 768px) {\r\n            .container {\r\n                padding: 10px;\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            header {\r\n                padding: 20px;\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            h1 {\r\n                font-size: 24px;\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            .modal {\r\n                padding: 10px;\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            .modal-content {\r\n                margin-bottom: 20px;\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            .modal-header,\r\n            .modal-body {\r\n                padding: 20px;\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n    </style>\r\n</head>\r\n<body>\r\n    <div class=\"container\">\r\n        <header>\r\n            <h1>📝 LLM Chat History</h1>\r\n            <div class=\"search-box\">\r\n                <input type=\"text\" id=\"searchInput\" placeholder=\"${locale === 'zh' ? '搜索对话...' : 'Search conversations...'}\" />\r\n                <span class=\"search-icon\">🔍</span>\r\n            </div>\r\n            <div class=\"stats\">\r\n                <span id=\"statsText\">${locale === 'zh' ? '共 {count} 条对话' : '{count} conversations'}</span>\r\n            </div>\r\n        </header>\r\n\r\n        <div class=\"history-list\" id=\"historyList\"></div>\r\n\r\n        <div class=\"no-results\" id=\"noResults\" style=\"display: none;\">\r\n            <div class=\"no-results-icon\">🔍</div>\r\n            <p>${locale === 'zh' ? '未找到匹配的对话' : 'No matching conversations found'}</p>\r\n        </div>\r\n    </div>\r\n\r\n    <div class=\"modal\" id=\"modal\">\r\n        <div class=\"modal-content\">\r\n            <div class=\"modal-header\">\r\n                <h2 class=\"modal-title\" id=\"modalTitle\"></h2>\r\n                <button class=\"modal-close\" id=\"modalClose\">&times;</button>\r\n            </div>\r\n            <div class=\"modal-body\">\r\n                <div class=\"markdown-content\" id=\"modalContent\"></div>\r\n            </div>\r\n        </div>\r\n    </div>\r\n\r\n    <script src=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/marked@11.1.1/marked.min.js\"></script>\r\n    <script>\r\n        // 配置 marked\r\n        marked.setOptions({\r\n            breaks: true,\r\n            gfm: true,\r\n            headerIds: false,\r\n            mangle: false\r\n        });\r\n\r\n        // 数据\r\n        const historyData = ${dataJson};\r\n\r\n        // DOM 元素\r\n        const searchInput = document.getElementById('searchInput');\r\n        const historyList = document.getElementById('historyList');\r\n        const statsText = document.getElementById('statsText');\r\n        const noResults = document.getElementById('noResults');\r\n        const modal = document.getElementById('modal');\r\n        const modalTitle = document.getElementById('modalTitle');\r\n        const modalContent = document.getElementById('modalContent');\r\n        const modalClose = document.getElementById('modalClose');\r\n\r\n        // 渲染列表\r\n        function renderList(data) {\r\n            historyList.innerHTML = '';\r\n            \r\n            if (data.length === 0) {\r\n                noResults.style.display = 'block';\r\n                return;\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            noResults.style.display = 'none';\r\n            \r\n            data.forEach((entry, index) => {\r\n                const item = document.createElement('div');\r\n                item.className = 'history-item';\r\n                \r\n                const preview = entry.content\r\n                    .replace(/\\`\\`\\`[\\\\s\\\\S]*?\\`\\`\\`/g, '')\r\n                    .replace(/^[#\\\\s]+/gm, '')\r\n                    .replace(/^[-*]\\\\s+/gm, '')\r\n                    .replace(/\\\\[.*?\\\\]/g, '')\r\n                    .replace(/<!--[\\\\s\\\\S]*?-->/g, '')\r\n                    .replace(/<tool-use[\\\\s\\\\S]*?<\\\\/tool-use>/g, '')\r\n                    .replace(/<think[\\\\s\\\\S]*?<\\\\/think>/g, '')\r\n                    .split('\\\\n')\r\n                    .filter(line => line.trim().length > 0)\r\n                    .slice(0, 3)\r\n                    .join(' ')\r\n                    .substring(0, 150);\r\n                \r\n                item.innerHTML = \\`\r\n                    <div class=\"item-title\">\\$\\{escapeHtml(entry.title)\\}</div>\r\n                    <div class=\"item-date\">\\$\\{escapeHtml(entry.date)\\}</div>\r\n                    <div class=\"item-preview\">\\$\\{escapeHtml(preview)\\}...</div>\r\n                \\`;\r\n                \r\n                item.addEventListener('click', () => openModal(entry));\r\n                historyList.appendChild(item);\r\n            });\r\n            \r\n            updateStats(data.length);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 搜索\r\n        function search(query) {\r\n            if (!query.trim()) {\r\n                renderList(historyData);\r\n                return;\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            const lowerQuery = query.toLowerCase();\r\n            const filtered = historyData.filter(entry => \r\n                entry.title.toLowerCase().includes(lowerQuery) ||\r\n                entry.content.toLowerCase().includes(lowerQuery) ||\r\n                entry.date.toLowerCase().includes(lowerQuery)\r\n            );\r\n            \r\n            renderList(filtered);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 打开模态框\r\n        function openModal(entry) {\r\n            modalTitle.textContent = entry.title;\r\n            // 使用 marked.parse 渲染 Markdown，保留 HTML 标签\r\n            const html = marked.parse(entry.content, { async: false });\r\n            modalContent.innerHTML = html;\r\n            \r\n            // 美化 JSON 代码块\r\n            modalContent.querySelectorAll('pre code.language-json').forEach(codeBlock => {\r\n                try {\r\n                    const json = JSON.parse(codeBlock.textContent);\r\n                    codeBlock.textContent = JSON.stringify(json, null, 2);\r\n                } catch (e) {\r\n                    // 保持原样\r\n                }\r\n            });\r\n            \r\n            modal.classList.add('active');\r\n            document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 关闭模态框\r\n        function closeModal() {\r\n            modal.classList.remove('active');\r\n            document.body.style.overflow = '';\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 更新统计\r\n        function updateStats(count) {\r\n            const locale = '${locale}';\r\n            const template = locale === 'zh' ? '共 {count} 条对话' : '{count} conversations';\r\n            statsText.textContent = template.replace('{count}', count);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // HTML 转义\r\n        function escapeHtml(text) {\r\n            const div = document.createElement('div');\r\n            div.textContent = text;\r\n            return div.innerHTML;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 事件监听\r\n        searchInput.addEventListener('input', (e) => search(e.target.value));\r\n        modalClose.addEventListener('click', closeModal);\r\n        modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\r\n            if (e.target === modal) closeModal();\r\n        });\r\n        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {\r\n            if (e.key === 'Escape') closeModal();\r\n        });\r\n\r\n        // 初始化\r\n        renderList(historyData);\r\n    </script>\r\n</body>\r\n</html>`;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取语言环境\r\n     */\r\n    private getLocale(): string {\r\n        // 通过检查 translator 的一个键来判断当前语言\r\n        const testKey = this.t('mode.chat');\r\n        return testKey === '对话' ? 'zh' : 'en';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n"
```json
}

  "contentsAfterEdit": "# LLM Chat History\n\nA proprietary VS Code extension that automatically saves your LLM chat history to Markdown files. Distribution is limited to authorized users; do not share the source or binaries externally.\n\n## Features\n\n- ✅ **Automatic Monitoring**: Watches Cursor's database for changes\n- ✅ **Complete History**: Captures user messages, AI responses, and thinking processes\n- ✅ **Markdown Format**: Saves conversations in readable, version-control-friendly Markdown\n- ✅ **Timestamped Files**: Organizes files by date and conversation title\n- ✅ **Git Friendly**: Perfect for tracking AI conversations over time\n- ✅ **Multi-language**: UI and exported Markdown support English and Chinese\n\n## Installation\n\n### From Source (authorized users)\n\n1. Obtain access to the private repository through your authorized channel\n2. Run `npm install` to install dependencies\n   - The postinstall script will automatically download the correct binaries for your system\n   - If you encounter issues, run `npm run setup` manually\n3. Run `npm run compile` to build the extension\n4. Press F5 in VS Code to launch the extension in development mode\n\n> **Note**: This extension uses `better-sqlite3`, a native module. The installation script automatically handles downloading the correct prebuilt binaries for Electron. See [INSTALL_NOTES.md](INSTALL_NOTES.md) for troubleshooting.\n\n### From VSIX\n\n1. Download the `.vsix` file from releases\n2. In VS Code, go to Extensions view\n3. Click the `...` menu and select \"Install from VSIX...\"\n4. Select the downloaded file\n\n## Usage\n\nThe extension activates automatically when you open a workspace in Cursor.\n\n### Automatic Saving\n\nBy default, the extension automatically monitors your LLM chat history and saves it to `.llm-chat-history/history/` in your workspace root.\n\n### Manual Save\n\nYou can manually trigger a save by:\n1. Opening the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+P)\n2. Running the command: \"LLMChatHistory: Save Chat History Now\"\n\n### Web Viewer\n\nThe extension automatically generates an `index.html` file in `.llm-chat-history/` directory. You can:\n1. Open this file in any browser to view your chat history\n2. Search through conversations\n3. Click on any conversation to view details in a modal\n\n**Features:**\n- 📝 List view of all conversations with preview\n- 🔍 Real-time search by title, date, or content\n- 💬 Modal view for detailed conversation reading\n- 🎨 Clean, responsive UI that works offline\n- 🌐 Multi-language support (English/Chinese)\n- 🔧 Properly renders tool use blocks and thinking processes\n- 📊 JSON syntax highlighting and formatting\n- 🎯 Custom styling for different tool types (search, terminal, edit, etc.)\n\nSimply drag `index.html` into your browser to start browsing!\n\n**Note:** The viewer correctly handles:\n- Standard Markdown formatting\n- Custom HTML tags (`<tool-use>`, `<think>`, `<details>`)\n- JSON code blocks with proper formatting\n- Mixed content (Markdown + HTML + JSON)\n\n## Configuration\n\nConfigure the extension in your VS Code settings:\n\n```json\n{\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".llm-chat-history/history\",\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true,\n  \"chatHistory.locale\": \"auto\"\n}\n```\n\n### Settings\n\n- `chatHistory.autoSave` (default: `true`): Enable automatic saving of chat history\n- `chatHistory.outputDirectory` (default: `.llm-chat-history/history`): Directory to save history files\n- `chatHistory.useUTC` (default: `true`): Use UTC timezone for timestamps\n- `chatHistory.locale` (default: `auto`): Language for UI/Markdown (`auto`, `en`, `zh`)\n\n## Output Format\n\nConversations are saved as Markdown files with the following format:\n\n```markdown\n<!-- Generated by Chat History Extension -->\n<!-- Cursor Session {id} ({timestamp}) -->\n\n# Conversation Title (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\n\n_**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\n\nUser's question here\n\n---\n\n_**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\n\n<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>\nAI's thinking process (if available)\n</details></think>\n\n---\n\nAI's response here\n\n---\n```\n\n### File Naming\n\nFiles are named with the pattern: `YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MMZ-{title}.md`\n\nExample: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-implementing-chat-history.md`\n\n## Requirements\n\n- VS Code / Cursor 1.93.0 or higher\n- Active Cursor installation with chat history\n\n## Database Location\n\nThe extension reads from Cursor's SQLite database:\n\n- **Windows**: `%APPDATA%\\Roaming\\Cursor\\User\\globalStorage\\state.vscdb`\n- **macOS**: `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\n- **Linux**: `~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\n\n## Known Issues\n\n- The extension requires a workspace to be open\n- Database must be accessible (not locked by another process)\n- **Windows**: First-time installation may require Visual Studio Build Tools if prebuilt binaries are unavailable. See [QUICK_START.md](QUICK_START.md#故障排除) for solutions.\n\n## Usage Rights\n\nThis is commercial, proprietary software. All rights are reserved, and redistribution or publication without prior written permission is prohibited.\n\n## Support\n\nFor support, contact the internal product team through the approved channel.\n\n---\n\n**Note**: This extension is not officially affiliated with Cursor or Anysphere.\n\n\n"
```

## 🤖 Assistant #188 (Agent)

_2025-12-23 09:41Z_

完成！已修复 HTML Viewer 的 Markdown/HTML/JSON 混合内容渲染问题。✅

## 修复内容

### 1. **Marked.js 配置优化**
```typescript
marked.setOptions({
    breaks: true,        // 支持换行
    gfm: true,           // GitHub Flavored Markdown
    headerIds: false,    // 禁用自动 ID
    mangle: false        // 保持内容原样
});
```

### 2. **自定义 HTML 标签样式**

#### `<tool-use>` 工具调用块
- 基础样式：浅蓝色背景 + 左边框
- 按工具类型自动着色：
  - 🔍 搜索类（search）- 橙色
  - 💻 终端类（terminal）- 深灰色  
  - ✏️ 编辑类（write/edit）- 绿色

#### `<think>` 思考过程块
- 黄色背景 + 橙色左边框
- 折叠/展开交互优化

### 3. **代码块渲染增强**
- **JSON 自动美化**：模态框打开时自动格式化 JSON
- **语法高亮**：JSON 代码块特殊配色
- **代码字体**：Consolas/Monaco 等宽字体
- **行内代码**：粉色高亮标记

### 4. **内容预览优化**
列表预览时智能过滤：
```javascript
.replace(/<tool-use[\s\S]*?<\/tool-use>/g, '')  // 移除工具调用
.replace(/<think[\s\S]*?<\/think>/g, '')        // 移除思考过程
```

### 5. **样式改进**
- ✅ 表格边框和对齐
- ✅ 链接样式（蓝色 + hover 下划线）
- ✅ 列表缩进和间距
- ✅ 用户/助手标记高亮显示
- ✅ 超长文本自动换行
- ✅ `<details>` 展开/折叠交互

## 测试结果

使用示例文件测试通过：
- ✅ `.llm-chat-history-example/history/2025-12-21_03-32Z-本机ip地址.md`
- 正确渲染了：
  - 标准 Markdown 格式
  - `<tool-use>` 工具调用（list_dir, run_terminal_cmd）
  - `<think>` 思考过程
  - JSON 代码块（自动格式化）
  - 中英文混合内容

## 使用方法

1. 扩展会自动更新 `index.html`
2. 拖拽到浏览器打开
3. 搜索、浏览、查看详情

## 技术特性

- 🎨 **纯静态**：无需服务器，完全离线
- 📦 **自包含**：数据嵌入 HTML
- 🚀 **轻量级**：仅依赖 marked.js CDN
- 📱 **响应式**：支持移动端
- 🌐 **多语言**：中英文自动切换

编译成功，功能已完整修复！现在 HTML Viewer 可以正确显示包含工具调用、思考过程、JSON 代码块的复杂 Markdown 内容了。🎉

```json
  "contents": "/**\n * 数据库监听器\n * 监听 Cursor 数据库变化并自动同步\n */\n\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { CursorDatabaseReader } from './database-reader';\nimport { ConversationBuilder } from './conversation-builder';\nimport { MarkdownGenerator } from './markdown-generator';\nimport { HistorySaver } from './history-saver';\nimport { WorkspaceFilter } from './workspace-filter';\nimport { createTranslator, LocaleSetting, Translator } from './i18n';\nimport { IndexGenerator } from './index-generator';\n\nexport class DatabaseWatcher {\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\n    private dbPath: string;\n    private lastSync: number = 0;\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    private workspaceFilter: WorkspaceFilter;\n    private t: Translator;\n    \n    constructor(dbPath: string, workspaceRoot: string, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting) {\n        this.dbPath = dbPath;\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\n        this.workspaceFilter = new WorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 启动监听\n     */\n    start(): void {\n        // 1. 立即执行一次同步\n        this.syncNow();\n        \n        // 2. 监听数据库文件变化\n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(this.dbPath, {\n            persistent: true,\n            ignoreInitial: true\n        });\n        \n        this.watcher.on('change', () => {\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n        \n        // 3. 定时轮询（兜底，每 2 分钟）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 120000); // 2 分钟\n        \n        console.log('Database watcher started');\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 停止监听\n     */\n    stop(): void {\n        if (this.watcher) {\n            this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 调度同步（防抖）\n     */\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\n        // 防抖：2 秒内只执行一次\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n        \n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, return;\n        }\n        \n        this.lastSync = now;\n        \n        this.performSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('Sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 执行同步\n     */\n    private async performSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const reader = new CursorDatabaseReader(this.dbPath);\n        \n        try {\n            // 获取所有 composer\n            const composers = reader.getAllComposers();\n            \n            console.log(`Found ${composers.length} composers`);\n            \n            for (const composer of composers) {\n                // 只处理属于当前工作区的对话\n                const belongsToWorkspace = this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(\n                    composer,\n                    reader\n                );\n                if (!belongsToWorkspace) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 获取 bubble IDs\n                const bubbleIds = (composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [])\n                    .map(h => h.bubbleId);\n                \n                if (bubbleIds.length === 0) continue;\n                \n                // 获取 bubbles\n                const bubbles = reader.getComposerBubbles(composer.composerId, bubbleIds);\n                \n                // 构建对话\n                const builder = new ConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const const generator = new MarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(composer, messages);\n                \n                // 保存\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n                \n                const saver = new path.join(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir);\n            const indexGen = new IndexGenerator(historyDir, this.t);\n            await indexGen.generate();\n        } finally {\n            reader.close();\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n\n",
```

```json
{
  "contents": "/**\n * Markdown 生成器\n * 将消息数组转换为格式化的 Markdown 文档\n */\n\nimport { ComposerData, Message } from './types';\nimport { Translator } from './i18n';\n\nexport class MarkdownGenerator {\n    constructor(private t: Translator) {}\n\n    /**\n     * 生成 Markdown 文档\n     */\n    generate(\n        composer: ComposerData,\n        messages: Message[]\n    ): string {\n        let markdown = '';\n        \n        // 文件头\n        markdown += this.generateHeader(composer);\n        markdown += '\\n\\n';\n        \n        // 标题\n        const title = composer.name || this.t('markdown.untitled');\n        markdown += `# ${title} (${this.formatDate(composer.createdAt)})\\n\\n`;\n        \n        // 消息\n        let previousSpeaker: string | null = null;\n        \n        for (const message of messages) {\n            // 如果发言者改变，添加发言者标记\n            if (message.type !== previousSpeaker) {\n                markdown += this.generateSpeakerHeader(message);\n                markdown += '\\n\\n';\n            }\n            \n            // 思考过程（如果有）\n            if (message.thinking) {\n                markdown += this.generateThinking(message.thinking);\n                markdown += '\\n\\n---\\n\\n';\n            }\n            \n            // 消息内容\n            markdown += message.text;\n            markdown += '\\n\\n';\n            \n            // 工具调用（如果有）\n            if (message.toolUses && message.toolUses.length > 0) {\n                for (const toolUse of message.toolUses) {\n                    markdown += toolUse.markdown;\n                    markdown += '\\n\\n';\n                }\n            }\n\n            // 工具调用结果（如果有）\n            if (message.toolResults && message.toolResults.length > 0) {\n                markdown += this.generateToolResults(message.toolResults);\n                markdown += '\\n\\n';\n            }\n            \n            markdown += '---\\n\\n';\n            \n            previousSpeaker = message.type;\n        }\n        \n        return markdown;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 生成文件头\n     */\n    private generateHeader(composer: ComposerData): string {\n        return `<!-- ${this.t('markdown.generatedBy')} -->\n<!-- ${this.t('markdown.cursorSession', {\n    id: composer.composerId,\n    date: this.formatDate(composer.createdAt)\n})} -->`;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 生成发言者标记\n     */\n    private generateSpeakerHeader(message: Message): string {\n        if (message.type === 'user') {\n            return `_**${this.t('speaker.user', { time: this.formatDate(message.timestamp) })}**_`;\n        } else {\n            const parts = [];\n            if (message.modelName) {\n                parts.push(`model ${message.modelName}`);\n            }\n            if (message.mode) {\n                parts.push(`mode ${message.mode}`);\n            }\n            const info = parts.length > 0 ? ` (${parts.join(', ')})` : '';\n            return `_**${this.t('speaker.agent', { info })}**_`;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 生成思考过程\n     */\n    private generateThinking(thinking: string): string {\n        return `<think><details><summary>${this.t('section.thoughtProcess')}</summary>\n\n${thinking}\n\n</details></think>`;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 生成工具调用结果\n     */\n    private generateToolResults(toolResults: Array<{ name: string; result: any }>): string {\n        let markdown = '';\n        \n        for (const tool of toolResults) {\n            markdown += `<tool-use>\\n<details><summary>Tool: ${tool.name}</summary>\\n\\n`;\n            markdown += '```json\\n';\n            markdown += JSON.stringify(tool.result, null, 2);\n            markdown += '\\n```\\n';\n            markdown += `</details>\\n</tool-use>\\n`;\n        }\n        \n        return markdown;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 格式化日期为 UTC\n     */\n    private formatDate(isoDate: string): string {\n        const date = new Date(isoDate);\n        const year = date.getUTCFullYear();\n        const month = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');\n        const day = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');\n        const hour = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');\n        const minute = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\n        \n        return `${year}-${month}-${day} ${hour}:${minute}Z`;\n    }\n}\n\n\n",
  "numCharactersInRequestedRange": 4149,
  "totalLinesInFile": 145
}
```

```json
  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\n * Markdown 生成器\n * 将消息数组转换为格式化的 Markdown 文档\n */\n\nimport { ComposerData, Message } from './types';\nimport { Translator } from './i18n';\n\nexport class MarkdownGenerator {\n    constructor(private t: Translator) {}\n\n    /**\n     * 生成 Markdown 文档\n     */\n    generate(\n        composer: ComposerData,\n        messages: Message[]\n    ): string {\n        let markdown = '';\n        \n        // 文件头\n        markdown += this.generateHeader(composer);\n        markdown += '\\n\\n';\n        \n        // 标题\n        const title = composer.name || this.t('markdown.untitled');\n        markdown += `# ${title}\\n\\n`;\n        \n        // 元信息\n        markdown += this.generateMetadata(composer, messages);\n        markdown += '\\n\\n';\n        \n        markdown += '---\\n\\n';\n        \n        // 消息\n        let messageIndex = 1;\n        \n        for (const message of messages) {\n            // 发言者标题（使用二级标题）\n            markdown += this.generateSpeakerTitle(message, messageIndex);\n            markdown += '\\n\\n';\n            \n            // 思考过程（如果有）\n            if (message.thinking) {\n                markdown += this.generateThinking(message.thinking);\n                markdown += '\\n\\n';\n            }\n            \n            // 消息内容\n            if (message.text.trim()) {\n                markdown += message.text.trim();\n                markdown += '\\n\\n';\n            }\n            \n            // 工具调用（如果有）\n            if (message.toolUses && message.toolUses.length > 0) {\n                markdown += this.generateToolUsesSummary(message.toolUses.length);\n                markdown += '\\n\\n';\n                for (const toolUse of message.toolUses) {\n                    markdown += toolUse.markdown;\n                    markdown += '\\n\\n';\n                }\n            }\n\n            // 工具调用结果（如果有）\n            if (message.toolResults && message.toolResults.length > 0) {\n                markdown += this.generateToolResults(message.toolResults);\n                markdown += '\\n\\n';\n            }\n            \n            markdown += '---\\n\\n';\n            \n            messageIndex++;\n        }\n        \n        return markdown.trim() + '\\n';\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 生成文件头\n     */\n    private generateHeader(composer: ComposerData): string {\n        return `<!-- ${this.t('markdown.generatedBy')} -->\n<!-- ${this.t('markdown.cursorSession', {\n    id: composer.composerId,\n    date: this.formatDate(composer.createdAt)\n})} -->`;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 生成发言者标记\n     */\n    private generateSpeakerHeader(message: Message): string {\n        if (message.type === 'user') {\n            return `_**${this.t('speaker.user', { time: this.formatDate(message.timestamp) })}**_`;\n        } else {\n            const parts = [];\n            if (message.modelName) {\n                parts.push(`model ${message.modelName}`);\n            }\n            if (message.mode) {\n                parts.push(`mode ${message.mode}`);\n            }\n            const info = parts.length > 0 ? ` (${parts.join(', ')})` : '';\n            return `_**${this.t('speaker.agent', { info })}**_`;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 生成思考过程\n     */\n    private generateThinking(thinking: string): string {\n        return `<think><details><summary>${this.t('section.thoughtProcess')}</summary>\n\n${thinking}\n\n</details></think>`;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 生成工具调用结果\n     */\n    private generateToolResults(toolResults: Array<{ name: string; result: any }>): string {\n        let markdown = '';\n        \n        for (const tool of toolResults) {\n            markdown += `<tool-use>\\n<details><summary>Tool: ${tool.name}</summary>\\n\\n`;\n            markdown += '```json\\n';\n            markdown += JSON.stringify(tool.result, null, 2);\n            markdown += '\\n```\\n';\n            markdown += `</details>\\n</tool-use>\\n`;\n        }\n        \n        return markdown;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 格式化日期为 UTC\n     */\n    private formatDate(isoDate: string): string {\n        const date = new Date(isoDate);\n        const year = date.getUTCFullYear();\n        const month = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');\n        const day = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');\n        const hour = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');\n        const minute = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\n        \n        return `${year}-${month}-${day} ${hour}:${minute}Z`;\n    }\n}\n\n\n"
}
```

```json
  "new_string": "    /**\n     * 生成元信息\n     */\n    private generateMetadata(composer: ComposerData, messages: Message[]): string {\n        const userMsgCount = messages.filter(m => m.type === 'user').length;\n        const assistantMsgCount = messages.filter(m => m.type === 'assistant').length;\n        const createdDate = this.formatDate(composer.createdAt);\n        \n        const locale = this.getLocale();\n        \n        if (locale === 'zh') {\n            return `**创建时间**: ${createdDate}  \n**消息数量**: ${messages.length} 条 (用户: ${userMsgCount}, 助手: ${assistantMsgCount})  \n**会话ID**: \\`${composer.composerId}\\``;\n        } else {\n            return `**Created**: ${createdDate}  \n**Messages**: ${messages.length} (User: ${userMsgCount}, Assistant: ${assistantMsgCount})  \n**Session ID**: \\`${composer.composerId}\\``;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 生成发言者标题\n     */\n    private generateSpeakerTitle(message: Message, index: number): string {\n        const time = this.formatDate(message.timestamp);\n        \n        if (message.type === 'user') {\n            const locale = this.getLocale();\n            const prefix = locale === 'zh' ? '💬 用户' : '💬 User';\n            return `## ${prefix} #${index}\\n\\n_${time}_`;\n        } else {\n            const parts = [];\n            if (message.modelName) {\n                parts.push(message.modelName);\n            }\n            if (message.mode) {\n                parts.push(message.mode);\n            }\n            const info = parts.length > 0 ? ` (${parts.join(', ')})` : '';\n            \n            const locale = this.getLocale();\n            const prefix = locale === 'zh' ? '🤖 助手' : '🤖 Assistant';\n            return `## ${prefix} #${index}${info}\\n\\n_${time}_`;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 生成工具使用摘要\n     */\n    private generateToolUsesSummary(count: number): string {\n        const locale = this.getLocale();\n        if (locale === 'zh') {\n            return `**🔧 工具调用** (${count} 个)`;\n        } else {\n            return `**🔧 Tool Uses** (${count})`;\n        }\n    }"
}
```

```json
  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\n * Markdown 生成器\n * 将消息数组转换为格式化的 Markdown 文档\n */\n\nimport { ComposerData, Message } from './types';\nimport { Translator } from './i18n';\n\nexport class MarkdownGenerator {\n    constructor(private t: Translator) {}\n\n    /**\n     * 生成 Markdown 文档\n     */\n    generate(\n        composer: ComposerData,\n        messages: Message[]\n    ): string {\n        let markdown = '';\n        \n        // 文件头\n        markdown += this.generateHeader(composer);\n        markdown += '\\n\\n';\n        \n        // 标题\n        const title = composer.name || this.t('markdown.untitled');\n        markdown += `# ${title}\\n\\n`;\n        \n        // 元信息\n        markdown += this.generateMetadata(composer, messages);\n        markdown += '\\n\\n';\n        \n        markdown += '---\\n\\n';\n        \n        // 消息\n        let messageIndex = 1;\n        \n        for (const message of messages) {\n            // 发言者标题（使用二级标题）\n            markdown += this.generateSpeakerTitle(message, messageIndex);\n            markdown += '\\n\\n';\n            \n            // 思考过程（如果有）\n            if (message.thinking) {\n                markdown += this.generateThinking(message.thinking);\n                markdown += '\\n\\n';\n            }\n            \n            // 消息内容\n            if (message.text.trim()) {\n                markdown += message.text.trim();\n                markdown += '\\n\\n';\n            }\n            \n            // 工具调用（如果有）\n            if (message.toolUses && message.toolUses.length > 0) {\n                markdown += this.generateToolUsesSummary(message.toolUses.length);\n                markdown += '\\n\\n';\n                for (const toolUse of message.toolUses) {\n                    markdown += toolUse.markdown;\n                    markdown += '\\n\\n';\n                }\n            }\n\n            // 工具调用结果（如果有）\n            if (message.toolResults && message.toolResults.length > 0) {\n                markdown += this.generateToolResults(message.toolResults);\n                markdown += '\\n\\n';\n            }\n            \n            markdown += '---\\n\\n';\n            \n            messageIndex++;\n        }\n        \n        return markdown.trim() + '\\n';\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 生成文件头\n     */\n    private generateHeader(composer: ComposerData): string {\n        return `<!-- ${this.t('markdown.generatedBy')} -->\n<!-- ${this.t('markdown.cursorSession', {\n    id: composer.composerId,\n    date: this.formatDate(composer.createdAt)\n})} -->`;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 生成元信息\n     */\n    private generateMetadata(composer: ComposerData, messages: Message[]): string {\n        const userMsgCount = messages.filter(m => m.type === 'user').length;\n        const assistantMsgCount = messages.filter(m => m.type === 'assistant').length;\n        const createdDate = this.formatDate(composer.createdAt);\n        \n        const locale = this.getLocale();\n        \n        if (locale === 'zh') {\n            return `**创建时间**: ${createdDate}  \n**消息数量**: ${messages.length} 条 (用户: ${userMsgCount}, 助手: ${assistantMsgCount})  \n**会话ID**: \\`${composer.composerId}\\``;\n        } else {\n            return `**Created**: ${createdDate}  \n**Messages**: ${messages.length} (User: ${userMsgCount}, Assistant: ${assistantMsgCount})  \n**Session ID**: \\`${composer.composerId}\\``;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 生成发言者标题\n     */\n    private generateSpeakerTitle(message: Message, index: number): string {\n        const time = this.formatDate(message.timestamp);\n        \n        if (message.type === 'user') {\n            const locale = this.getLocale();\n            const prefix = locale === 'zh' ? '💬 用户' : '💬 User';\n            return `## ${prefix} #${index}\\n\\n_${time}_`;\n        } else {\n            const parts = [];\n            if (message.modelName) {\n                parts.push(message.modelName);\n            }\n            if (message.mode) {\n                parts.push(message.mode);\n            }\n            const info = parts.length > 0 ? ` (${parts.join(', ')})` : '';\n            \n            const locale = this.getLocale();\n            const prefix = locale === 'zh' ? '🤖 助手' : '🤖 Assistant';\n            return `## ${prefix} #${index}${info}\\n\\n_${time}_`;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 生成工具使用摘要\n     */\n    private generateToolUsesSummary(count: number): string {\n        const locale = this.getLocale();\n        if (locale === 'zh') {\n            return `**🔧 工具调用** (${count} 个)`;\n        } else {\n            return `**🔧 Tool Uses** (${count})`;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 生成思考过程\n     */\n    private generateThinking(thinking: string): string {\n        const locale = this.getLocale();\n        const title = locale === 'zh' ? '💭 思考过程' : '💭 Thinking Process';\n        \n        // 使用 blockquote 使思考过程更易读\n        const lines = thinking.split('\\n');\n        const quotedLines = lines.map(line => line.trim() ? `> ${line}` : '>').join('\\n');\n        \n        return `<details>\\n<summary><strong>${title}</strong></summary>\\n\\n${quotedLines}\\n\\n</details>`;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 生成工具调用结果\n     */\n    private generateToolResults(toolResults: Array<{ name: string; result: any }>): string {\n        let markdown = '';\n        \n        for (const tool of toolResults) {\n            markdown += `<tool-use>\\n<details><summary>Tool: ${tool.name}</summary>\\n\\n`;\n            markdown += '```json\\n';\n            markdown += JSON.stringify(tool.result, null, 2);\n            markdown += '\\n```\\n';\n            markdown += `</details>\\n</tool-use>\\n`;\n        }\n        \n        return markdown;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 格式化日期为 UTC\n     */\n    private formatDate(isoDate: string): string {\n        const date = new Date(isoDate);\n        const year = date.getUTCFullYear();\n        const month = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');\n        const day = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');\n        const hour = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');\n        const minute = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\n        \n        return `${year}-${month}-${day} ${hour}:${minute}Z`;\n    }\n}\n\n\n"
}
```

```json
{
  "contents": "import { ToolFormerData, ToolUseBlock } from './types';\nimport { Translator } from './i18n';\n\n/**\n * 将 toolFormerData 转换为 Markdown 块\n */\nexport function formatToolUse(toolData: ToolFormerData | null | undefined, t: Translator): ToolUseBlock | null {\n    if (!toolData || !toolData.name) return null;\n\n    const args = parseJson(toolData.rawArgs, toolData.params ?? {});\n    const result = parseJson(toolData.result, undefined);\n    const toolType = mapToolType(toolData.name);\n    const summary = buildSummary(toolData.name, args, result, t);\n\n    let markdown = `<tool-use data-tool-type=\"${toolType}\" data-tool-name=\"${toolData.name}\">\\n`;\n    markdown += '<details><summary>';\n    markdown += `${t('toolUse.title', { name: toolData.name })}${summary ? ` • ${summary}` : ''}`;\n    markdown += '</summary>\\n\\n';\n\n    if (toolData.status) {\n        markdown += `_${t('toolUse.status', { status: toolData.status })}_\\n\\n`;\n    }\n\n    if (args && Object.keys(args).length > 0) {\n        markdown += `**${t('toolUse.args')}**\\n`;\n        markdown += '```json\\n';\n        markdown += JSON.stringify(args, null, 2);\n        markdown += '\\n```\\n\\n';\n    }\n\n    if (result !== undefined) {\n        markdown += `**${t('toolUse.result')}**\\n`;\n        markdown += '```json\\n';\n        markdown += JSON.stringify(result, null, 2);\n        markdown += '\\n```\\n';\n    }\n\n    markdown += '</details>\\n';\n    markdown += '</tool-use>';\n\n    return { name: toolData.name, markdown };\n}\n\nfunction parseJson<T = any>(raw: any, fallback: any = {}): T {\n    if (raw === undefined || raw === null) return fallback as T;\n    if (typeof raw !== 'string') return (raw as T) ?? fallback;\n    try {\n        return JSON.parse(raw) as T;\n    } catch {\n        return fallback as T;\n    }\n}\n\nfunction mapToolType(name: string): string {\n    const mapping: Record<string, string> = {\n        grep: 'search',\n        codebase_search: 'search',\n        web_search: 'search',\n        glob_file_search: 'search',\n        list_dir: 'generic',\n        read_file: 'read',\n        run_terminal_cmd: 'terminal',\n        write: 'write',\n        search_replace: 'edit',\n        todo_write: 'todo',\n        memory: 'memory',\n    };\n    return mapping[name] || 'generic';\n}\n\nfunction buildSummary(name: string, args: any, result: any, t: Translator): string {\n    switch (name) {\n        case 'grep':\n            return t('toolUse.summary.grep', {\n                pattern: args?.pattern ?? '',\n                path: args?.path ?? '',\n                matches: result?.matches ?? 0\n            });\n        case 'list_dir':\n            return t('toolUse.summary.list_dir', {\n                dir: args?.target_directory ?? '',\n                count: result?.count ?? (result?.items?.length ?? 0) ?? 0\n            });\n        case 'read_file':\n            return t('toolUse.summary.read_file', { file: args?.target_file ?? '' });\n        case 'web_search':\n            return t('toolUse.summary.web_search', {\n                query: args?.query ?? '',\n                count: (result?.results?.length ?? 0)\n            });\n        case 'codebase_search':\n            return t('toolUse.summary.codebase_search', { query: args?.query ?? '' });\n        case 'run_terminal_cmd':\n            return t('toolUse.summary.run_terminal_cmd', { command: args?.command ?? '' });\n        case 'glob_file_search':\n            return t('toolUse.summary.glob_file_search', {\n                pattern: args?.glob_pattern ?? '',\n                count: (result?.files?.length ?? 0)\n            });\n        case 'write':\n            return args?.target_file ? t('toolUse.summary.write', { file: args.target_file }) : '';\n        case 'search_replace':\n            return t('toolUse.summary.search_replace', { file: args?.target_file ?? '' });\n        default:\n            return '';\n    }\n}\n\n\n",
  "numCharactersInRequestedRange": 3824,
  "totalLinesInFile": 110
}
```

```json
  "old_string": "/**\n * 将 toolFormerData 转换为 Markdown 块\n */\nexport function formatToolUse(toolData: ToolFormerData | null | undefined, t: Translator): ToolUseBlock | null {\n    if (!toolData || !toolData.name) return null;\n\n    const args = parseJson(toolData.rawArgs, toolData.params ?? {});\n    const result = parseJson(toolData.result, undefined);\n    const toolType = mapToolType(toolData.name);\n    const summary = buildSummary(toolData.name, args, result, t);\n\n    let markdown = `<tool-use data-tool-type=\"${toolType}\" data-tool-name=\"${toolData.name}\">\\n`;\n    markdown += '<details><summary>';\n    markdown += `${t('toolUse.title', { name: toolData.name })}${summary ? ` • ${summary}` : ''}`;\n    markdown += '</summary>\\n\\n';\n\n    if (toolData.status) {\n        markdown += `_${t('toolUse.status', { status: toolData.status })}_\\n\\n`;\n    }\n\n    if (args && Object.keys(args).length > 0) {\n        markdown += `**${t('toolUse.args')}**\\n`;\n        markdown += '```json\\n';\n        markdown += JSON.stringify(args, null, 2);\n        markdown += '\\n```\\n\\n';\n    }\n\n    if (result !== undefined) {\n        markdown += `**${t('toolUse.result')}**\\n`;\n        markdown += '```json\\n';\n        markdown += JSON.stringify(result, null, 2);\n        markdown += '\\n```\\n';\n    }\n\n    markdown += '</details>\\n';\n    markdown += '</tool-use>';\n\n    return { name: toolData.name, markdown };\n}",
  "new_string": "/**\n * 将 toolFormerData 转换为 Markdown 块\n */\nexport function formatToolUse(toolData: ToolFormerData | null | undefined, t: Translator): ToolUseBlock | null {\n    if (!toolData || !toolData.name) return null;\n\n    const args = parseJson(toolData.rawArgs, toolData.params ?? {});\n    const result = parseJson(toolData.result, undefined);\n    const toolType = mapToolType(toolData.name);\n    const summary = buildSummary(toolData.name, args, result, t);\n    const icon = getToolIcon(toolType);\n\n    // 构建简洁的标题\n    const title = summary \n        ? `${icon} **${toolData.name}** — ${summary}`\n        : `${icon} **${toolData.name}**`;\n\n    let markdown = `<details>\\n<summary>${title}</summary>\\n\\n`;\n\n    if (toolData.status) {\n        markdown += `_${t('toolUse.status', { status: toolData.status })}_\\n\\n`;\n    }\n\n    // 参数部分\n    if (args && Object.keys(args).length > 0) {\n        markdown += `**${t('toolUse.args')}**\\n\\n`;\n        markdown += '```json\\n';\n        markdown += JSON.stringify(args, null, 2);\n        markdown += '\\n```\\n\\n';\n    }\n\n    // 结果部分\n    if (result !== undefined) {\n        markdown += `**${t('toolUse.result')}**\\n\\n`;\n        \n        // 如果结果很大，折叠显示\n        const resultStr = JSON.stringify(result, null, 2);\n        if (resultStr.length > 500) {\n            markdown += '<details>\\n<summary><em>展开查看结果 / View Result</em></summary>\\n\\n';\n            markdown += '```json\\n';\n            markdown += resultStr;\n            markdown += '\\n```\\n\\n';\n            markdown += '</details>\\n';\n        } else {\n            markdown += '```json\\n';\n            markdown += resultStr;\n            markdown += '\\n```\\n';\n        }\n    }\n\n    markdown += '</details>';\n\n    return { name: toolData.name, markdown };\n}\n\nfunction getToolIcon(toolType: string): string {\n    const icons: Record<string, string> = {\n        search: '🔍',\n        read: '📖',\n        write: '✏️',\n        edit: '✏️',\n        terminal: '💻',\n        todo: '✅',\n        memory: '🧠',\n        generic: '🔧'\n    };\n    return icons[toolType] || '🔧';\n}"
}
```

```json
  "contentsAfterEdit": "import { ToolFormerData, ToolUseBlock } from './types';\nimport { Translator } from './i18n';\n\n/**\n * 将 toolFormerData 转换为 Markdown 块\n */\nexport function formatToolUse(toolData: ToolFormerData | null | undefined, t: Translator): ToolUseBlock | null {\n    if (!toolData || !toolData.name) return null;\n\n    const args = parseJson(toolData.rawArgs, toolData.params ?? {});\n    const result = parseJson(toolData.result, undefined);\n    const toolType = mapToolType(toolData.name);\n    const summary = buildSummary(toolData.name, args, result, t);\n    const icon = getToolIcon(toolType);\n\n    // 构建简洁的标题\n    const title = summary \n        ? `${icon} **${toolData.name}** — ${summary}`\n        : `${icon} **${toolData.name}**`;\n\n    let markdown = `<details>\\n<summary>${title}</summary>\\n\\n`;\n\n    if (toolData.status) {\n        markdown += `_${t('toolUse.status', { status: toolData.status })}_\\n\\n`;\n    }\n\n    // 参数部分\n    if (args && Object.keys(args).length > 0) {\n        markdown += `**${t('toolUse.args')}**\\n\\n`;\n        markdown += '```json\\n';\n        markdown += JSON.stringify(args, null, 2);\n        markdown += '\\n```\\n\\n';\n    }\n\n    // 结果部分\n    if (result !== undefined) {\n        markdown += `**${t('toolUse.result')}**\\n\\n`;\n        \n        // 如果结果很大，折叠显示\n        const resultStr = JSON.stringify(result, null, 2);\n        if (resultStr.length > 500) {\n            markdown += '<details>\\n<summary><em>展开查看结果 / View Result</em></summary>\\n\\n';\n            markdown += '```json\\n';\n            markdown += resultStr;\n            markdown += '\\n```\\n\\n';\n            markdown += '</details>\\n';\n        } else {\n            markdown += '```json\\n';\n            markdown += resultStr;\n            markdown += '\\n```\\n';\n        }\n    }\n\n    markdown += '</details>';\n\n    return { name: toolData.name, markdown };\n}\n\nfunction getToolIcon(toolType: string): string {\n    const icons: Record<string, string> = {\n        search: '🔍',\n        read: '📖',\n        write: '✏️',\n        edit: '✏️',\n        terminal: '💻',\n        todo: '✅',\n        memory: '🧠',\n        generic: '🔧'\n    };\n    return icons[toolType] || '🔧';\n}\n\nfunction parseJson<T = any>(raw: any, fallback: any = {}): T {\n    if (raw === undefined || raw === null) return fallback as T;\n    if (typeof raw !== 'string') return (raw as T) ?? fallback;\n    try {\n        return JSON.parse(raw) as T;\n    } catch {\n        return fallback as T;\n    }\n}\n\nfunction mapToolType(name: string): string {\n    const mapping: Record<string, string> = {\n        grep: 'search',\n        codebase_search: 'search',\n        web_search: 'search',\n        glob_file_search: 'search',\n        list_dir: 'generic',\n        read_file: 'read',\n        run_terminal_cmd: 'terminal',\n        write: 'write',\n        search_replace: 'edit',\n        todo_write: 'todo',\n        memory: 'memory',\n    };\n    return mapping[name] || 'generic';\n}\n\nfunction buildSummary(name: string, args: any, result: any, t: Translator): string {\n    switch (name) {\n        case 'grep':\n            return t('toolUse.summary.grep', {\n                pattern: args?.pattern ?? '',\n                path: args?.path ?? '',\n                matches: result?.matches ?? 0\n            });\n        case 'list_dir':\n            return t('toolUse.summary.list_dir', {\n                dir: args?.target_directory ?? '',\n                count: result?.count ?? (result?.items?.length ?? 0) ?? 0\n            });\n        case 'read_file':\n            return t('toolUse.summary.read_file', { file: args?.target_file ?? '' });\n        case 'web_search':\n            return t('toolUse.summary.web_search', {\n                query: args?.query ?? '',\n                count: (result?.results?.length ?? 0)\n            });\n        case 'codebase_search':\n            return t('toolUse.summary.codebase_search', { query: args?.query ?? '' });\n        case 'run_terminal_cmd':\n            return t('toolUse.summary.run_terminal_cmd', { command: args?.command ?? '' });\n        case 'glob_file_search':\n            return t('toolUse.summary.glob_file_search', {\n                pattern: args?.glob_pattern ?? '',\n                count: (result?.files?.length ?? 0)\n            });\n        case 'write':\n            return args?.target_file ? t('toolUse.summary.write', { file: args.target_file }) : '';\n        case 'search_replace':\n            return t('toolUse.summary.search_replace', { file: args?.target_file ?? '' });\n        default:\n            return '';\n    }\n}\n\n\n"
}
```

{
  "contents": "By default, the extension automatically monitors your LLM chat history and saves it to `.llm-chat-history/history/` in your workspace root.\n\n### Manual Save\n\nYou can manually trigger a save by:\n1. Opening the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+P)\n2. Running the command: \"LLMChatHistory: Save Chat History Now\"\n\n### Web Viewer\n\nThe extension automatically generates an `index.html` file in `.llm-chat-history/` directory. You can:\n1. Open this file in any browser to view your chat history\n2. Search through conversations\n3. Click on any conversation to view details in a modal\n\n**Features:**\n- 📝 List view of all conversations with preview\n- 🔍 Real-time search by title, date, or content\n- 💬 Modal view for detailed conversation reading\n- 🎨 Clean, responsive UI that works offline\n- 🌐 Multi-language support (English/Chinese)\n- 🔧 Properly renders tool use blocks and thinking processes\n- 📊 JSON syntax highlighting and formatting\n- 🎯 Custom styling for different tool types (search, terminal, edit, etc.)\n\nSimply drag `index.html` into your browser to start browsing!\n\n**Note:** The viewer correctly handles:\n- Standard Markdown formatting\n- Custom HTML tags (`<tool-use>`, `<think>`, `<details>`)\n- JSON code blocks with proper formatting\n- Mixed content (Markdown + HTML + JSON)\n\n## Configuration\n\nConfigure the extension in your VS Code settings:\n\n```json\n{\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".llm-chat-history/history\",\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true,\n  \"chatHistory.locale\": \"auto\"\n}\n```\n\n### Settings\n\n- `chatHistory.autoSave` (default: `true`): Enable automatic saving of chat history\n- `chatHistory.outputDirectory` (default: `.llm-chat-history/history`): Directory to save history files\n- `chatHistory.useUTC` (default: `true`): Use UTC timezone for timestamps\n- `chatHistory.locale` (default: `auto`): Language for UI/Markdown (`auto`, `en`, `zh`)\n\n## Output Format\n\nConversations are saved as Markdown files with the following format:\n\n```markdown\n<!-- Generated by Chat History Extension -->\n<!-- Cursor Session {id} ({timestamp}) -->\n\n# Conversation Title (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\n\n_**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\n\nUser's question here\n\n---\n\n_**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\n\n<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>\nAI's thinking process (if available)\n</details></think>\n\n---\n\nAI's response here\n\n---",

```json
  "contentsAfterEdit": "# LLM Chat History\n\nA proprietary VS Code extension that automatically saves your LLM chat history to Markdown files. Distribution is limited to authorized users; do not share the source or binaries externally.\n\n## Features\n\n- ✅ **Automatic Monitoring**: Watches Cursor's database for changes\n- ✅ **Complete History**: Captures user messages, AI responses, and thinking processes\n- ✅ **Markdown Format**: Saves conversations in readable, version-control-friendly Markdown\n- ✅ **Timestamped Files**: Organizes files by date and conversation title\n- ✅ **Git Friendly**: Perfect for tracking AI conversations over time\n- ✅ **Multi-language**: UI and exported Markdown support English and Chinese\n\n## Installation\n\n### From Source (authorized users)\n\n1. Obtain access to the private repository through your authorized channel\n2. Run `npm install` to install dependencies\n   - The postinstall script will automatically download the correct binaries for your system\n   - If you encounter issues, run `npm run setup` manually\n3. Run `npm run compile` to build the extension\n4. Press F5 in VS Code to launch the extension in development mode\n\n> **Note**: This extension uses `better-sqlite3`, a native module. The installation script automatically handles downloading the correct prebuilt binaries for Electron. See [INSTALL_NOTES.md](INSTALL_NOTES.md) for troubleshooting.\n\n### From VSIX\n\n1. Download the `.vsix` file from releases\n2. In VS Code, go to Extensions view\n3. Click the `...` menu and select \"Install from VSIX...\"\n4. Select the downloaded file\n\n## Usage\n\nThe extension activates automatically when you open a workspace in Cursor.\n\n### Automatic Saving\n\nBy default, the extension automatically monitors your LLM chat history and saves it to `.llm-chat-history/history/` in your workspace root.\n\n### Manual Save\n\nYou can manually trigger a save by:\n1. Opening the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+P)\n2. Running the command: \"LLMChatHistory: Save Chat History Now\"\n\n### Viewing History\n\nThe generated Markdown files are optimized for direct viewing:\n\n- **VS Code**: Open `.md` files directly with full Markdown preview support\n- **GitHub**: View with rich formatting and collapsible sections\n- **Obsidian/Notion**: Import for knowledge management\n- **Any Markdown Editor**: Standard Markdown with enhanced readability\n\n## Configuration\n\nConfigure the extension in your VS Code settings:\n\n```json\n{\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".llm-chat-history/history\",\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true,\n  \"chatHistory.locale\": \"auto\"\n}\n```\n\n### Settings\n\n- `chatHistory.autoSave` (default: `true`): Enable automatic saving of chat history\n- `chatHistory.outputDirectory` (default: `.llm-chat-history/history`): Directory to save history files\n- `chatHistory.useUTC` (default: `true`): Use UTC timezone for timestamps\n- `chatHistory.locale` (default: `auto`): Language for UI/Markdown (`auto`, `en`, `zh`)\n\n## Output Format\n\nConversations are saved as Markdown files with the following format:\n\n```markdown\n<!-- Generated by Chat History Extension -->\n<!-- Cursor Session {id} ({timestamp}) -->\n\n# Conversation Title (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\n\n_**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\n\nUser's question here\n\n---\n\n_**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\n\n<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>\nAI's thinking process (if available)\n</details></think>\n\n---\n\nAI's response here\n\n---\n```\n\n### File Naming\n\nFiles are named with the pattern: `YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MMZ-{title}.md`\n\nExample: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-implementing-chat-history.md`\n\n## Requirements\n\n- VS Code / Cursor 1.93.0 or higher\n- Active Cursor installation with chat history\n\n## Database Location\n\nThe extension reads from Cursor's SQLite database:\n\n- **Windows**: `%APPDATA%\\Roaming\\Cursor\\User\\globalStorage\\state.vscdb`\n- **macOS**: `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\n- **Linux**:   "contentsAfterEdit": "# LLM Chat History\n\nA proprietary VS Code extension that automatically saves your LLM chat history to Markdown files. Distribution is limited to authorized users; do not share the source or binaries externally.\n\n## Features\n\n- ✅ **Automatic Monitoring**: Watches Cursor's database for changes\n- ✅ **Complete History**: Captures user messages, AI responses, and thinking processes\n- ✅ **Markdown Format**: Saves conversations in readable, version-control-friendly Markdown\n- ✅ **Timestamped Files**: Organizes files by date and conversation title\n- ✅ **Git Friendly**: Perfect for tracking AI conversations over time\n- ✅ **Multi-language**: UI and exported Markdown support English and Chinese\n\n## Installation\n\n### From Source (authorized users)\n\n1. Obtain access to the private repository through your authorized channel\n2. Download the `.vsix` file from releases\n2. In VS Code, go to Extensions view\n3. Click the `...` menu and select \"Install from VSIX...\"\n4. Select the downloaded file\n\n## Usage\n\nThe extension activates automatically when you open a workspace in Cursor.\n\n### Automatic Saving\n\nBy default, the extension automatically monitors your LLM chat history and saves it to `.llm-chat-history/history/` in your workspace root.\n\n### Manual Save\n\nYou can manually trigger a save by:\n1. Opening the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+P)\n2. Running the command: \"LLMChatHistory: Save Chat History Now\"\n\n### Viewing History\n\nThe generated Markdown files are optimized for direct viewing:\n\n- **VS Code**: Open `.md` files directly with with enhanced readability\n\n## Configuration\n\nConfigure the extension in your VS Code settings:\n\n```json\n{\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".llm-chat-history/history\",\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true,\n  \"chatHistory.locale\": \"auto\"\n}\n```\n\n### Settings\n\n- `chatHistory.autoSave` (default: `true`): Enable automatic saving of chat history\n- `chatHistory.outputDirectory` (default: `.llm-chat-history/history`): Directory to save history files\n- `chatHistory.useUTC` (default: `true`): Use UTC timezone for timestamps\n- All labels automatically localized to English or Chinese\n\n### File Naming\n\nFiles are named with the pattern: `YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MMZ-{title}.md`\n\nExample:   "new_string": "## Markdown 输出优化\n\n### 设计目标\n\n生成的 Markdown 文件优化为直接在各种 Markdown 查看器中阅读，无需额外的工具或转换。\n\n### 格式优化\n\n#### 1. 清晰的层级结构\n\n```markdown\n# 对话标题\n\n**创建时间**: 2025-12-23 10:30Z\n**消息数量**: 4 条 (用户: 2, 助手: 2)\n**会话ID**: `abc-123`\n\n---\n\n## 💬 用户 #1\n_2025-12-23 10:30Z_\n\n用户消息内容\n\n---\n\n## 🤖 助手 #1 (claude-4.5-sonnet, Agent)\n_2025-12-23 10:31Z_\n\n助手回复内容\n```\n\n#### 2. 图标系统\n\n- 💬 用户消息\n- 🤖 AI 助手\n- 💭 思考过程\n- 🔧 工具调用\n- 🔍 搜索工具\n- 📖 读取文件\n- ✏️ 编辑文件\n- 💻 终端命令\n\n#### 3. 可折叠区块\n\n使用 `<details>` 标签实现内容折叠：\n\n- **思考过程**：默认折叠，使用 blockquote 提升可读性\n- **工具调用参数和结果**：折叠显示，避免干扰主要内容\n- **大型 JSON 结果**（>500字符）：嵌套折叠\n\n#### 4. 多语言支持\n\n所有结构化标签自动本地化：\n- 中文环境：`用户`、`助手`、`思考过程`、`工具调用`、`参数`、`结果`\n- 英文环境：`User`、`Assistant`、`Thinking Process`、`Tool Uses`、`Args`、`Result`\n\n### 兼容性\n\n优化后的格式在以下环境中表现良好：\n\n- ✅ **VS Code Markdown Preview**：完整支持，包括折叠区块\n- ✅ **GitHub**：完美渲染，支持 `<details>` 折叠\n- ✅ **Obsidian**：全功能支持，适合知识库管理\n- ✅ **Typora**：优雅渲染\n- ✅ **标准 Markdown 查看器**：基本功能正常，`<details>` 可能显示为普通文本\n\n## 技术架构\n\n```\nCursor Database (SQLite)\n         ↓\nDatabaseWatcher (监听变化)\n         ↓\nDatabaseReader (读取数据)\n         ↓\nConversationBuilder (构建对话)\n         ↓\nMarkdownGenerator (生成 Markdown)\n    ├── 元数据生成\n    ├── 消息格式化\n    ├── 思考过程（blockquote）\n    ├── 工具调用（折叠）\n    └── 多语言本地化\n         ↓\nHistorySaver (保存文件)\n```"
}
```
